en.heading: Translation
en.body:
Please note that translations are not official versions, even though they are provided on the WCA website for convenience.
If there is a difference between a translation and the (current official) English version, the English version must be used.

zh.heading: 翻译
zh.body:
请注意翻译版本并不是官方版本（尽管它可以在WCA网站上查阅）：它可能很有用，但并不保证翻译是非常准确的。
如果某个翻译版本与（当前官方的）英文版本有出入，以英文版本为准。如果你发现了任何翻译错误或不准确的地方，请联系[欧阳韵奇](mailto:oyyq99999@gmail.com)。

en.heading: WCA Regulations
en.body:
The WCA Regulations contain the full set of Regulations that apply to all official competitions sanctioned by the World Cube Association.
Previously, from the January 1st, 2013 release until the January 1st, 2025 release, the WCA Regulations were split into the WCA Regulations and the WCA Guidelines. The former contents of both documents were combined into the WCA Regulations for the July 17th, 2025 release.

zh.heading: WCA规则及指南
zh.body:
WCA规则包含了世界魔方协会认可的比赛应该遵循的所有规则。
在之前（从2013年1月1日到2025年1月1日）的版本中，WCA规则分成了规则和指南两个部分。之前这两部分的内容在2025年7月17日发布的版本中被合并到了WCA规则中。

en.heading: Wording
en.body: Uses of the words "must", "must not", "should", "should not" and "may" match [RFC 2119](https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc2119.txt).

zh.heading: 措辞
zh.body: 关于“必须”，“禁止”，“应该”，“不应该”，“可以”("must"，"must not"，"should"，"should not" and "may")的用法请参考[RFC 2119](https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc2119.txt)。

en.body: Development of the WCA Regulations is public [on GitHub](https://github.com/thewca/wca-regulations) and the discussion is public [on the WCA Forum](https://forum.worldcubeassociation.org/c/regulations).

zh.heading: 源代码
zh.body: WCA规则的修订公开[于GitHub](https://github.com/thewca/wca-regulations)以及相关讨论公开[于WCA论坛](https://forum.worldcubeassociation.org/c/regulations)。

en.heading: Contact
en.body: For questions and feedback, please contact the [WCA Regulations Committee (WRC)](mailto:wrc@worldcubeassociation.org).

zh.heading: 联系
zh.body: 如果有任何疑问或反馈，请联系[WCA规则委员会 (WRC)](mailto:wrc@worldcubeassociation.org)。

en.heading: Labels
en.body:
To be more informative, certain Regulations are classified using one of the following labels. Note that this should be treated as metadata, not as a description of importance.

- [ADDITION] Additional information to supplement other Regulations.
- [CLARIFICATION] Information to address any possible questions about the interpretation of the Regulations.
- [EXPLANATION] Information that clarifies the intent of Regulations.
- [RECOMMENDATION] Something that is not strictly mandatory, but that should be done if possible.
- [REMINDER] Information that may be addressed by other Regulations, but whose relevance is worth reiterating.
- [EXAMPLE] An example of how to apply a Regulation.


## [Contents](regulations:contents)

Note: Because Article and Regulation numbers are not reassigned when Regulations are deleted, there may be gaps in numbering.

zh.heading: 标签
zh.body:
为了提供更多信息，部分规则使用以下标签进行分类。请注意，这应该被视为元数据，而不是重要性描述。

- [附加] 相关规则的附加说明。
- [澄清] 对相关规则可能异议的说明。
- [解释] 对规则的进一步说明。
- [建议] 并不强制实行的内容，但如果可能最好实行。
- [提醒] 其他规则可能涉及的信息，但值得重申。
- [举例] 对规则的使用方式的一些例子。

## [正文](regulations:contents)

注意：在某些原有规则被删除后，由于章节和规则的编号不会进行重新分配，所以在编号之间可能存在间隔。

clauses.en: A competition must include a WCA Delegate and an organization team (consisting of one or more individuals) with the following officials: judges, scramblers and score takers.
clauses.zh: 一场比赛必须包含一位WCA代表及一个由以下成员组成的主办团队（包含至少一个人）：裁判，打乱员，录入员。

clauses.en: A competition with one or more Head to Head rounds (see [Article I](regulations:article:I)) must also have one or more announcers.
clauses.zh: 具有“一对一”轮次（见[附则I](regulations:article:I)）的比赛必须有一个或多个发令员。

clauses.en: The organization team of a competition is responsible for logistics before, during, and after the competition.
clauses.zh: 一场比赛的主办团队负责比赛前后的后勤工作。

clauses.en: The WCA Delegate is responsible for ensuring that the competition adheres to the WCA Regulations and any applicable WCA policies or requirements. The WCA Delegate may appoint other members of the organization team to carry out specific responsibilities on their behalf, but is ultimately accountable for how these responsibilities are carried out.
clauses.zh: WCA代表负责保证比赛遵守WCA规则以及任何适用的WCA政策或者要求。WCA代表可以指定主办团队中的其他人来承担一些职责，但最终将对这些职责的履行负责。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] If there are multiple WCA Delegates designated for the competition, "the WCA Delegate" refers to any of them. "The WCA Delegate" also refers to anyone appointed by a designated WCA Delegate for a relevant responsibility of the WCA Delegate for the competition.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 如果一场比赛中指定了多个WCA代表，“WCA代表”指的是他们当中任何一个。“WCA代表”也指被WCA代表指定履行相关职责的任何人。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] WCA Delegates may attend the competition without being designated to serve in the WCA Delegate role for the competition. "The WCA Delegate" does not refer to them unless they have been appointed with a relevant responsibility by a designated WCA Delegate for the competition (see [Regulation 1c+](regulations:regulation:1c+)).
clauses.zh: [澄清] WCA代表们可以在不被指定担当本场代表角色的情况下参加比赛。除非他们被比赛指定的代表指定履行相关职责（见[规则1c+](regulations:regulation:1c+)），否则“WCA代表”不包括他们。

clauses.en: Each event must have one or more judges.
clauses.zh: 每个项目必须包含至少一名裁判。

clauses.en: A judge is responsible for executing the procedures of the event.
clauses.zh: 裁判需要为某个项目的执行过程负责。

clauses.en: A judge may judge multiple competitors simultaneously at the discretion of the WCA Delegate, as long as the judge is able to ensure that all WCA Regulations are followed at all times.
clauses.zh: 在WCA代表的允许下，裁判可以同时裁多名选手，只要该裁判可以确保整个过程完全遵守WCA规则。

clauses.en: Every competitor must be available for judging. If required to judge, a competitor may be excused only for a legitimate reason (e.g. being unfamiliar with a puzzle), at the discretion of the WCA Delegate. Penalty: disqualification from an event, multiple events, or all events at that competition (see [Regulation 2k](regulations:regulation:2k)).
clauses.zh: 所有选手必须做好当裁判的准备。如果需要他作为裁判，除非他能给出合理的理由（例如不熟悉这种魔方），否则不允许推辞，由WCA代表决定。惩罚：取消其参加比赛中的一个项目、多个项目或者整场比赛的资格（见[规则2k](regulations:regulation:2k)）。

clauses.en: Each event must have one or more scramblers. Exception: 3x3x3 Fewest Moves.
clauses.zh: 每个项目必须包含至少一名打乱员。例外：三阶最少步。

clauses.en: A scrambler applies scramble sequences to prepare puzzles for attempts (see [Regulation A2](regulations:regulation:A2)).
clauses.zh: 打乱员将魔方按照打乱公式打乱（见[规则A2](regulations:regulation:A2)）。

clauses.en: Every competitor must be available for scrambling. If required to scramble, a competitor may be excused only for a legitimate reason (e.g. being unfamiliar with scrambling notation), at the discretion of the WCA Delegate. Penalty: disqualification from an event, multiple events, or all events at that competition (see [Regulation 2k](regulations:regulation:2k)).
clauses.zh: 所有选手必须做好当打乱员的准备。如果需要他作为打乱员，除非他能给出合理的理由（例如不熟悉打乱标记），否则不允许推辞，由WCA代表决定。惩罚：取消其参加比赛中的一个项目、多个项目或者整场比赛的资格（见[规则2k](regulations:regulation:2k)）。

clauses.en: Each event must have one or more score takers.
clauses.zh: 每个项目必须包含至少一名录入员。

clauses.en: A score taker is responsible for compiling results.
clauses.zh: 录入员负责编辑录入成绩。

clauses.en: Changes to the result on a score sheet are only permitted at the discretion of the WCA Delegate.
clauses.zh: 所有对成绩的修改都必须在WCA代表的监督之下进行。

clauses.en: Competitors in the same round of an event may compete as a single group or be divided into multiple groups.
clauses.zh: 同项目同一轮的选手可以以一组进行比赛或者被分成若干组。

clauses.en: [RECOMMENDATION] Competitors in the same group should use the same scramble sequences. Different groups should use different scramble sequences.
clauses.zh: [建议] 同一组的选手应该使用相同的打乱公式。不同组的选手应该使用不同的打乱公式。

clauses.en: [RECOMMENDATION] All attempts in the final round of an event, as well as all 3x3x3 Fewest Moves attempts, should have the same scramble sequences for all competitors (i.e. only 1 group).
clauses.zh: [建议] 所有项目最后一轮中的每一次还原，以及三阶最少步项目的所有还原，对于所有的选手应该使用同样的打乱公式（即只有一组）。

clauses.en: [ADDITION] Competitors may request to compete at a time different to the scheduled time for the round in a separate group. The WCA Delegate should carefully consider the fairness and practicality of the situation before approving any such requests, and must ensure that such attempts follow [Regulation 9l](regulations:regulation:9l) (i.e. they must start after all competitors have finished their attempts from any previous round of the same event, and finish before any competitor has started an attempt for any following round of the same event). Competitors requesting such accommodations should contact the organization team and WCA Delegate before the competition. Exception: such accommodations are not permitted for 3x3x3 Fewest Moves, which specifies its own limited accommodations in [Regulation E6](regulations:regulation:E6).
clauses.zh: [附加] 选手可以要求在计划时间以外的时间在单独的组别中参加比赛。WCA代表在同意这样的请求之前应该认真考虑其公平性和可行性，并且必须保证这些尝试符合[规则9l](regulations:regulation:9l)（也就是说他们必须在所有选手完成前一轮比赛之后开始，以及任何人开始该项目的下一轮比赛之前完成）。提出这样要求的选手应该在比赛之前联系主办团队以及WCA代表。例外：这种要求不得用于三阶最少步比赛，在[规则E6](regulations:regulation:E6)中有三阶最少步的相关规定。

clauses.en: Scramblers and judges for a round must not scramble for/judge competitors in their own group before they have finished all of their attempts for the round. The following exceptions apply:
clauses.zh: 某一轮的裁判和打乱员在他们自己完成该轮所有比赛前禁止执裁/打乱同组选手。以下情况例外：

clauses.en: For 3x3x3 Fewest Moves, judges may judge competitors in their own group before they have finished their attempt (i.e. while they are competing).
clauses.zh: 对于三阶最少步，裁判可以在完成该次尝试前（即自己也在比赛中）对自己同组选手进行执裁。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] Judges who are competing in a 3x3x3 Fewest Moves attempt they are judging must not begin grading attempts until they have finished their own attempt. They may begin grading before the end of the 60 minutes if they have submitted their attempt early (see [Regulation E2b+](regulations:regulation:E2b+)). They should get another judge to grade their own attempt.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 正在参与三阶最少步比赛尝试的裁判，在完成自己的尝试之前，不得开始对其他选手的解法进行判卷。如果他们提前提交了解法（见[规则E2b+](regulations:regulation:E2b+)），可以在60分钟比赛时间结束前开始判卷。他们自己的解法应由另一名裁判进行评判。

clauses.en: For 3x3x3 Multi-Blind, competitors may judge other competitors in their own group after they have finished their attempt.
clauses.zh: 对于三阶多盲，选手可以在完成了自己的尝试之后对自己同组的其他选手进行执裁。

clauses.en: All officials may compete in the competition.
clauses.zh: 所有工作人员都可以参加比赛。

clauses.en: Officials may serve multiple roles (e.g. organization team, WCA Delegate, judge, score taker, scrambler).
clauses.zh: 工作人员可以身兼数职（例如组织团队，WCA代表，裁判，录入员，打乱员）。

clauses.en: Each Head to Head round must have an announcer.
clauses.zh: 每个“一对一”轮次都必须有发令员。

clauses.en: Any person may compete in a WCA competition if they:
clauses.zh: 所有满足以下条件的个人可以参加WCA比赛：

clauses.en: Comply with WCA Regulations.
clauses.zh: 遵从WCA规则。

clauses.en: Meet the competition requirements, which must be clearly announced before the competition.
clauses.zh: 符合比赛要求，要求的具体内容必须在赛前宣布。

clauses.en: Are not suspended from participation by the WCA.
clauses.zh: 没有被WCA禁赛。

clauses.en: Comply with all reasonable safety measures deemed necessary by the WCA Delegate, which must be clearly announced before the competition.
clauses.zh: 遵守WCA代表认为必要的所有合理安全措施，这些措施必须在赛前被明确宣布。

clauses.en: Competitors below the age of 18 must obtain consent from their parent(s)/guardian(s) to register and compete.
clauses.zh: 小于18周岁的选手必须在他家长/监护人的允许下报名参赛。

clauses.en: Competitors register by providing all information required by the organization team (including: name, country, date of birth, contact information, selected events).
clauses.zh: 选手在报名时需要提交所有主办团队要求的信息（包括：姓名、国家/地区、生日、联系方式、项目）。

clauses.en: [ADDITION] First-time competitors must register using their legal name or the name they prefer to be called in real life. Last names must be legal last names.
clauses.zh: [附加] 第一次参加比赛的选手必须用他们的法定姓名或他们倾向于在生活中使用的姓名报名。姓氏必须是法定姓名的姓氏。

clauses.en: A competitor is not eligible to compete without a completed registration, as determined by the organization team and the WCA Delegate.
clauses.zh: 如果没有提供完整的信息，选手的报名可能会被忽略，取决于主办团队和WCA代表。

clauses.en: Returning competitors must provide personal information consistent with their WCA profile. If a competitor wishes to change or update their personal information between competitions (e.g. a change of country, name, or gender), they must [contact the WCA Results Team](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/contact?contactRecipient=wrt) either directly or through a WCA Delegate.
clauses.zh: 参加过比赛的选手提供的个人信息必须与他们的WCA资料一致。如果选手希望在比赛之间更改或者更新个人信息（如更改国家/地区、姓名、性别等），则必须直接或通过WCA代表[联系WCA成绩组](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/contact?contactRecipient=wrt)。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] A WCA profile is the collection of data related to a competitor, and includes their personal information (name, country, gender, and date of birth) as well as all their results in official WCA competitions.
clauses.zh: [澄清] WCA资料是一个选手的相关数据的集合，包括他们的个人信息（姓名、国家/地区、性别和生日），同样也包括他们在WCA官方比赛中的比赛成绩。

clauses.en: A competitor's name, country, gender, and competition results are considered public information. All other personal information is considered confidential, and must not be disclosed to outside organizations/persons without the consent of the competitor.
clauses.zh: 选手的姓名、国家/地区、性别及比赛结果属于公开信息。其他个人信息均属于隐私，未经本人许可禁止将其提供给其他组织或个人。

clauses.en: [ADDITION] Date of birth and contact information should be especially secured.
clauses.zh: [附加] 生日和联系方式需要特别注意保密。

clauses.en: [REMINDER] If a third party (e.g. journalist) asks the organization team to be put in contact with any competitor(s), the competitor(s) must first be asked for consent.
clauses.zh: [提醒] 如果有第三方（例如记者）向主办团队索要任何选手的联系方式，主办团队必须首先征得该选手的同意。

clauses.en: Competitors must represent a country of which they hold citizenship. The WCA Delegate should verify citizenship by means of documents or photos of documents (e.g. a passport) at their first competition.
clauses.zh: 选手必须代表他拥有公民权的国家/地区。WCA代表应该根据证件或证件照片（例如护照）在选手首次参赛时确认其公民权。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] If a competitor holds multiple citizenships, they may choose which region to represent at their first competition.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 如果一个选手有多个公民权，他可以在第一次参赛时选择他所代表的地区。

clauses.en: [ADDITION] The WCA Delegate should also verify the name and date of birth by means of documents or photos of documents (e.g. a passport) of every new competitor at their first competition.
clauses.zh: [附加] WCA代表也应该根据一些证件或证件照片（例如护照）确认每一个首次参赛选手的姓名和生日。

clauses.en: The eligible countries are defined by the [WCA List of Recognized Countries](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/regulations/countries/).
clauses.zh: 有效的国家/地区列表由[WCA承认的国家/地区](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/regulations/countries/)给出。

clauses.en: Competitors may change their country at any point between competitions (see [Regulation 2c2](regulations:regulation:2c2)), as long as it has been at least one year since any previous change.
clauses.zh: 选手可以在任意的比赛之间的时间点更改其代表的国家/地区(见[规则2c2](regulations:regulation:2c2)，但至少要和之前的更改间隔一年。

clauses.en: Exception: If the competitor loses citizenship of the country which they were previously representing, they must change their country before or at their next competition.
clauses.zh: 例外：如果选手失去了以前所代表国家/地区的公民权，那么他们必须在下一场比赛（或之前）改变代表的国家/地区（见[规则2c2](regulations:regulation:2c2)）。

clauses.en: Exception: If the competitor has acquired a new citizenship within the calendar year, they may change their country to their new citizenship before or at their next competition.
clauses.zh: 例外：如果选手在日历年当中取得了新的公民权，他们可以在下一场比赛或之前更改其代表的国家/地区为新获得公民权的国家/地区。

clauses.en: Competitors must obey venue rules and conduct themselves in a considerate manner.
clauses.zh: 选手必须遵守赛场秩序，并保持一个选手应有的自律。

clauses.en: Competitors must remain quiet when inside the designated competition area. Talking is permitted, but must be kept at a reasonable level, and away from competitors who are actively competing.
clauses.zh: 在指定的比赛区域，选手必须保持安静。可以说话，但禁止大声喧哗，且应远离正在比赛的选手。

clauses.en: Competitors in a group in progress must not communicate with other competitors in the group about the scrambled states of the group, unless all such competitors are not eligible for any further attempts in the group. Penalty: disqualification of the competitor(s) from the event, at the discretion of the WCA Delegate. Exception: for 3x3x3 Fewest Moves and 3x3x3 Multi-Blind, competitors that have finished their attempt may share and discuss the scramble sequence(s) with other competitors in the group who have either finished their attempt or declined their attempt.
clauses.zh: 在一个正在进行比赛的组别中的选手禁止相互讨论当前正在进行的这一组的打乱状态，除非这些选手都已经没有在这一组中继续比赛的机会了。惩罚：取消这些选手该项目的资格，由WCA代表决定。例外：对于三阶最少步和三阶多盲，完成尝试的选手可以和已经完成尝试或放弃相应尝试的选手分享和讨论相关的打乱步骤。

clauses.en: For rounds where results are being entered live, the organization team may enforce that competitors are not permitted to view the results entered from their group until they have completed their attempts.
clauses.zh: 对于实时录入成绩的轮次，主办团队可以要求选手在完成自己的尝试之前，不得查看其同组已录入的成绩。

clauses.en: Competitors must be appropriately dressed while in the competition venue. At the discretion of the WCA Delegate, competitors may be disqualified from the competition for inappropriate clothing.
clauses.zh: 在比赛现场选手必须穿着得体。对于不合适的穿着，WCA代表有权取消其比赛资格。

clauses.en: While inspecting or solving, competitors may use objects that do not give an unfair advantage, at the discretion of the WCA Delegate. Penalty for using a non-permited object: disqualification of the attempt (DNF). Exception: if a non-permitted object is used, the current attempt and any completed attempts do not need be disqualified if the competitor did not gain an unfair advantage from the object, at the discretion of the WCA Delegate, however the competitor must not be permitted to perform any further attempts with the object.
clauses.zh: 在观察或复原的过程中，选手可以使用不构成不公平优势的物品，具体由WCA代表裁定。若使用了未被允许的物品的惩罚：取消此次还原资格（DNF）。例外：如果选手使用了未被允许的物品，但根据WCA代表的裁定，该物品并未使其获得不公平优势，则本次尝试以及已完成的尝试不必判为无效；然而，该选手禁止在后续尝试中继续使用该物品。

clauses.en: Examples of objects that should be permitted:
clauses.zh: 应该被允许使用的物品的例子：

clauses.en: Medical/physical aids worn by the competitor (e.g. glasses, wrist brace).
clauses.zh: 医学/体育类辅助装备（例如眼镜，护腕）。

clauses.en: Non-electronic earplugs and earmuffs, but not electronic headphones and earbuds (see [Regulation 2i2a](regulations:regulation:2i2a)).
clauses.zh: 非电子类的耳塞和耳罩，但不包括电子耳机和耳塞（见[规则2i2a](regulations:regulation:2i2a)）。

clauses.en: Food and drink.
clauses.zh: 食物和饮料。

clauses.en: Electronic or non-electronic hand warmers.
clauses.zh: 电子式或非电子式的暖手宝。

clauses.en: Cameras, including cellphones used as cameras. Camera monitors must be blank or out of sight of the competitor.
clauses.zh: 相机，包括作为相机使用的手机。相机的显示屏必须保持空白，或不在选手的视线范围内。

clauses.en: The following objects must not be permitted to use during an attempt:
clauses.zh: 以下物品禁止在尝试中使用：

clauses.en: Devices capable of playing audio to the competitor that would not be audible to the judge (e.g. electronic headphones and earbuds). This includes relevant devices which are switched off or disconnected. Exception: medical aids of this sort (e.g. hearing aids) may be permitted if the competitor does not have a comfortable alternative.
clauses.zh: 能够向选手播放音频且裁判无法听到的设备（例如电子耳机和入耳式耳塞）。这包括处于关闭或未连接状态的相关设备。例外：此类医疗辅助设备（例如助听器）在选手没有舒适替代方案的情况下可以被允许使用。

clauses.en: Devices used to display information through an active screen visible to the competitor (e.g. a cellphone or tablet computer).
clauses.zh: 可以通过活动屏幕显示信息并且能被选手看到的设备（例如手机或平板电脑）。

clauses.en: Written notes or other reference material containing information on how to solve a puzzle.
clauses.zh: 包含如何复原魔方的信息的笔记或其它参考资料。

clauses.en: Other puzzles.
clauses.zh: 其它的魔方。

clauses.en: Additional lighting.
clauses.zh: 补光灯。

clauses.en: The WCA Delegate may disqualify a competitor from specific attempts and/or events.
clauses.zh: WCA可以取消某个选手某次还原或者某个项目的资格。

clauses.en: If a competitor is disqualified from an event for any reason, they are not eligible for any more attempts in the event.
clauses.zh: 如果某个选手以任何理由被剥夺了参加某项目的资格，那么他将失去当前项目的所有还原机会。

clauses.en: If the competitor has already started at least one attempt in a round before being disqualified from it, the results of all remaining attempts in the event are recorded as DNF. If the competitor has started no attempts, no results are recorded (see [Regulation 9f5a](regulations:regulation:9f5a)).
clauses.zh: 如果选手在被取消比赛资格之前已经在某轮比赛中开始了至少一次尝试，则该项目中所有接下来的尝试均被记作DNF。 如果选手没有开始尝试，则不记录任何结果（见[规则9f5a](regulations:regulation:9f5a)）。

clauses.en: Results from attempts that are completed when the disqualification is applied must not be disqualified. Exception: cheating or defrauding (see [Regulation 2k2a](regulations:regulation:2k2a)).
clauses.zh: 当选手被取消资格的时候，已完成的尝试中取得的成绩不得被取消。例外：作弊或欺骗（见[规则2k2a](regulations:regulation:2k2a)）。

clauses.en: [EXAMPLE] For example, if a competitor is disqualified from an event for failing to show up for the final round, their results from earlier rounds remain valid.
clauses.zh: [举例] 例如，如果某个选手没有赶上某个项目的最后一轮，那他之前轮的成绩依然有效。

clauses.en: [EXAMPLE] If the WCA Delegate disqualifies a competitor during their third attempt in a round, only the third attempt and all following attempts in that event are disqualified, even if the circumstances that originated the disqualification occurred prior to this attempt.
clauses.zh: [举例] 如果WCA代表在一轮中的第三次还原的时候取消了某个选手的成绩，那么只有第三次还原以及之后的还原尝试被取消成绩，即使造成取消成绩的情况是在这次还原之前发生。

clauses.en: Specific completed attempts may be disqualified under the circumstances described in [Regulation 2k](regulations:regulation:2k), only if the relevant incident occurred during the attempt.
clauses.zh: 在[规则2k]中所描述的情形下，某些已经完成的尝试可以被取消成绩，前提是相关违规发生在这些尝试当中。

clauses.en: At the discretion of the WCA Delegate, a competitor may be disqualified from specific attempts and/or events (a single event, multiple events, or all events) if the competitor:
clauses.zh: 当选手发生以下情况时，WCA代表可以取消该选手某些尝试或者某些项目（单个项目，多个项目或所有项目）的资格：

clauses.en: Fails to check in or register in time for the competition.
clauses.zh: 没有及时报名或检录。

clauses.en: Is suspected of cheating or defrauding the officials during the competition.
clauses.zh: 在比赛中涉嫌作弊或欺骗工作人员。

clauses.en: The WCA Delegate may disqualify any suspected results.
clauses.zh: WCA代表可以取消任何有疑问的成绩。

clauses.en: Behaves in a way that is unlawful/violent/indecent/unsafe, or intentionally damages venue facilities or personal property within the venue.
clauses.zh: 做出了一些违法、暴力、粗鲁或危险的行为，或者故意损坏赛场或他人物品。

clauses.en: Distracts or interferes with others during the competition.
clauses.zh: 在比赛中妨碍或干扰他人。

clauses.en: Fails to abide by WCA Regulations during the competition.
clauses.zh: 在比赛中不遵守WCA规则。

clauses.en: Does not fulfill the event's requirements (e.g. not knowing how to solve the puzzle). A competitor should not compete with the expectation of a DNF result or an intentionally poor result.
clauses.zh: 不满足项目要求（例如不会还原相应的魔方）。选手不应该故意想获得DNF或一个很差的成绩。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] WCA Delegates should only use their discretion to prevent competitors from being a severe detriment to the competition (e.g. wasting time and/or competition resources). Competitors should not be disqualified for a "poor" result when they are competing to the best of their abilities.
clauses.zh: [澄清] WCA代表只应该在选手严重干扰比赛的情况下（例如浪费时间或资源）行使这样的权力。选手在尽力的情况下不应该因为成绩太“差”而被取消资格。

clauses.en: A competitor may be disqualified immediately, or after a warning, depending on the nature and severity of the infraction.
clauses.zh: 可以在比赛过程中立即剥夺某个选手的资格，也可以在警告之后，取决于具体违规情况及严重程度。

clauses.en: A disqualified competitor is not eligible for the refund of any expenses due to participating in the competition.
clauses.zh: 选手参加比赛所支付的一切费用，在被剥夺参赛资格后不予退还。

clauses.en: Competitors may verbally dispute a ruling to the WCA Delegate.
clauses.zh: 选手可以在口头上和WCA代表就裁决结果进行争辩。

clauses.en: Disputes are only permitted during the competition (see [Regulation 9u](regulations:regulation:9u)), within 30 minutes of the disputed incident and before the start of any following rounds of the relevant event.
clauses.zh: 争辩仅限于比赛过程中进行（见[规则9u](regulations:regulation:9u)），且必须在争议发生后的30分钟内且在相关项目的下一轮比赛开始前进行。

clauses.en: The WCA Delegate must resolve the dispute before the start of the next round of the event.
clauses.zh: WCA代表必须在下一轮或下一个项目开始前解决争议。

clauses.en: The competitor must accept all final rulings of the WCA Delegate. Penalty: disqualification from the competition.
clauses.zh: 选手必须接受WCA代表的最终判决。惩罚：取消比赛资格。

clauses.en: [ADDITION] The competitor may escalate their dispute after the competition by following the process described in the [Disputes Motion](https://documents.worldcubeassociation.org/documents/motions/16.2025.1%20-%20Disputes.pdf).
clauses.zh: [附加] 选手可以在比赛后遵照[争议议案](https://documents.worldcubeassociation.org/documents/motions/16.2025.1%20-%20Disputes.pdf)中的描述来申诉他们在比赛中出现的争议。

clauses.en: Competitors with circumstances (e.g. disability) that may prevent them from abiding by one or more WCA Regulations may request special accommodations from the WCA Delegate. Competitors requesting such accommodations should contact the organization team and WCA Delegate at least two weeks before the competition.
clauses.zh: 对于那些因为特殊因素（例如：身体残疾）而无法遵守WCA规则的选手可以向WCA代表申请特批，但必须在比赛两周之前联系WCA代表或主办团队。

clauses.en: [REMINDER] Special accommodations must be noted in the Delegate Report.
clauses.zh: [提醒] 特批之处必须记录在WCA报告中。

clauses.en: [EXAMPLE] Competitors whose circumstances (e.g. religion) do not allow them to compete on a specific date or time may be allowed to compete at a different time at the discretion of the WCA Delegate. The WCA Delegate should consider the availability of competition resources when attending such requests. This includes the possibility to provisionally compete in subsequent round(s) before the previous round(s) is (are) completed. Competitors should not be allowed to compete at a time or date that is not part of, or immediately adjacent to, the existing competition schedule. Competitors should not be allowed to compete outside of the competition venue.
clauses.zh: [举例] 如果选手的特殊因素（例如宗教）不允许他们在特定日期或时间参加比赛，WCA代表可酌情决定允许其在不同时间参加比赛。WCA代表在处理此类请求时应考虑比赛资源的可用性。这包括选手在完成上一轮比赛之前可能需要参加后续轮次的可能性。选手不应该被允许在非比赛日程范围或非紧邻现有比赛安排的时间参赛。选手也不应该被允许在比赛场地之外参赛。

clauses.en: [EXAMPLE] A competitor that can not use one of their hands to start the timer may receive assistance from the judge to start and stop the timer, or a competitor that cannot hear may receive their inspection warnings in a different way.
clauses.zh: [举例] 不能用双手启动计时器的选手可以得到裁判的帮助来启动和停止计时器，或者听不见声音的选手可以以不同的方式接收观察时间提示。

clauses.en: Competitors whose circumstances result in it being impossible to follow regular competition procedures may have special accommodations. These cases should be brought up to the WCA Regulations Committee before being applied.
clauses.zh: 因特殊因素而无法遵守常规比赛程序的选手可以获得特殊照顾。这些情况应在事前向WCA规则委员会报备。

clauses.en: [EXAMPLE] Examples of such accommodations include: a blind competitor using a second hand to feel the pieces in 3x3x3 One-Handed or using a second puzzle with special pieces during memorization phase in 3x3x3 Blindfolded.
clauses.zh: [举例] 这些照顾的示例：盲人选手在三阶单手项目中使用另一只手来感觉魔方的状态或者在三阶盲拧项目中使用另一个有特殊块的魔方来记忆魔方的状态。

clauses.en: Competitors must be present and ready to compete when they are called to compete for an attempt. Penalty: disqualification from the event.
clauses.zh: 当被要求出赛时，选手必须在场且随时准备开始比赛。惩罚：取消该项目的资格。

clauses.en: Exception: a competitor who is not present in time for an individually scheduled attempt (e.g. a 3x3x3 Fewest Moves attempt, a 3x3x3 Multi-Blind attempt) may be considered to have declined that attempt (DNS), at the discretion of the WCA Delegate.
clauses.zh: 例外：对于那些自主开始的项目（例如：三阶最少步，三阶多盲），可以将此次复原记为放弃（DNS），由WCA代表决定。

clauses.en: [ADDITION] The competitor may compete at the discretion of the WCA Delegate. The WCA Delegate must carefully consider the fairness of allowing it.
clauses.zh: [附加] 选手可以在WCA代表同意的情况下参与比赛。WCA代表必须谨慎考虑同意选手比赛对比赛公平性的影响。

clauses.en: Exception: for rounds with a cumulative time limit, a competitor who arrives late may compete with a reduced cumulative time limit, at the discretion of the WCA Delegate.
clauses.zh: 例外：对于设有累计还原时限的比赛轮次，迟到的选手可以在减少还原时限的前提下比赛，由WCA代表决定。

clauses.en: Competitors are responsible for providing their puzzles for the competition.
clauses.zh: 选手负责提供他们自己的参赛魔方。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] Competitors may use puzzles of any reasonable size, at the discretion of the WCA Delegate.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 选手可以使用任意合适大小的魔方，由WCA代表决定。

clauses.en: [ADDITION] By default, a competitor should use the same puzzle for consecutive attempts in a speed solving round. A competitor may switch puzzles between attempts, at the discretion of the judge or WCA Delegate.
clauses.zh: [附加] 默认的，选手在同一轮里应该使用同一个魔方。选手也可以在每次还原之间更换魔方，由WCA代表决定。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] Competitors may borrow puzzles from other competitors privately, to use in competition.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 选手可以在私下里向其他选手借用魔方参赛。

clauses.en: Competitors must be ready to submit their puzzles when they are called (see [Regulation 2u](regulations:regulation:2u)).
clauses.zh: 当被要求出赛时，选手必须做好了提交魔方的准备（见[规则2u](regulations:regulation:2u)）。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] Competitors may be disqualified if they do not have a puzzle ready to submit soon after they are called (e.g. if they planned to use a puzzle that another competitor is currently using, and therefore cannot submit a puzzle at the moment).
clauses.zh: [澄清] 当被要求出赛时，如果该选手没有准备好一个可用的魔方（例如他打算借用他人的魔方，而那人正在比赛，无法马上借出魔方），那么他有可能会被取消参赛资格。

clauses.en: Puzzles must be fully operational, such that normal scrambling is possible.
clauses.zh: 魔方必须完全可转动，以便被正常的打乱。

clauses.en: Polyhedral puzzles must use a color scheme with one unique color per face in the solved state. Each puzzle variation must have moves, states, and solutions functionally identical to the original puzzle.
clauses.zh: 正多面体魔方必须使用一面一色的配色。所有对魔方的改动必须保证在转动、状态、解法等方面完全等价于改动前的魔方。

clauses.en: Puzzles must not have electronic components (e.g. Bluetooth or Wi-Fi capabilities, motors, sensors, lights).
clauses.zh: 魔方不能含有电子元件（例如蓝牙或Wi-Fi连接能力、电机、传感器、灯光等）。

clauses.en: Puzzles must have colored parts, which define the color scheme of the puzzle and must be one and only one of the following: colored stickers, colored tiles, colored plastic, or painted/printed colors. All colored parts of a puzzle must be made of a similar material. Exception: for Clock, puzzles do not have colored parts.
clauses.zh: 魔方上必须有有色部分，以便确认该魔方的配色。有色部分必须为以下几种的唯一一种：贴纸、贴片、喷漆或涂料。所有有色部分必须具有相同的材质。例外：魔表并不具备“有色部分”。

clauses.en: For competitors with a medically documented visual disability, the following exceptions apply:
clauses.zh: 对于有视觉障碍的选手，可采用下述例外规则：

clauses.en: Blind competitors may use textured puzzles with different textures on different faces. Each face should have a distinct color, to aid in scrambling and judging.
clauses.zh: 盲人选手可以使用以纹理区分不同面的魔方。同一个面上的纹理必须一致。不同面之间应该使用不同的颜色，以便打乱或判决。

clauses.en: Color blind competitors who cannot distinguish between the necessary number of colors may use colored parts with additional uniform colors or patterns, if it has been explicitly approved according to [Regulation 2s](regulations:regulation:2s). Additional uniform colors or patterns may come from stickers or be drawn.
clauses.zh: 在根据[规则2s](regulations:regulation:2s)明确批准的前提下，无法辨识足够数量颜色的色盲选手可以使用带有附加颜色或图案的有色部分。其中附加颜色或图案可以来自贴纸或手绘。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] Additional uniform colors or patterns do not need to be present on every face, but only on faces where a distinct color cannot be found. Pieces must not have any features (e.g. textures, pattern irregularities) that significantly distinguish them from similar pieces.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 附加颜色或图案不需要出现在每一面上，只需要在无法辨别不同颜色的面上有即可。这些块不能与其他相似的块有显著区别（例如纹理、不规则的图案）。

clauses.en: The colors of the colored parts must be solid, with one uniform color per face. Each color must be clearly distinct from the other colors.
clauses.zh: 魔方的有色部分必须是纯色的，同一个面上的颜色必须一致，不同面的颜色之间必须可清晰地区分。

clauses.en: Modifications that enhance the basic concept of a puzzle are not permitted. Modified versions of puzzles are permitted only if the modification does not make any additional information available to the competitor (e.g. orientation or identity of pieces), compared to an unmodified version of the same puzzle.
clauses.zh: 禁止对魔方进行超常的修改。对魔方的合法修改必须满足：这一修改相比于未修改的同类魔方无法给选手提供任何附加信息（例如区分两个块）。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] Puzzles may be refined internally by sanding, lubrication, or modifications which improve stability (e.g. magnets).
clauses.zh: [澄清] 魔方内部可以被精心打磨、润滑或者修改以提高稳定性（例如加磁）。

clauses.en: [EXAMPLE] Examples of enhancements include: new moves are possible, normal moves are impossible, more pieces or faces are visible, colors on the backside of the puzzle are visible, moves are done automatically, or the puzzles have more/different solved states.
clauses.zh: [举例] 超常的修改包括：新的转动方式，无法进行常规的转动，可以看到更多的块，可以看到背面的颜色，自动转动，更多或不同的还原状态。

clauses.en: "Pillowed" puzzles are permitted.
clauses.zh: 可以使用“面包”魔方。

clauses.en: Puzzles whose colored plastic is visible inside the puzzle (e.g. "stickerless" puzzles) are permitted. This does not include the following puzzles:
clauses.zh: 可以从内部看到外表面颜色的魔方（例如“六色魔方”）是允许的。但不包括以下魔方：

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] "Stickerless" puzzles that significantly differ from most mass-produced "stickerless" puzzles are only permitted at the discretion of the WCA Delegate.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 如果某种“六色魔方”和现在大量生产的“六色魔方”有明显的差别，需要由WCA代表决定是否可以使用。

clauses.en: Puzzles with transparent parts that can reasonably reveal more information about the state of the puzzle. Exception: an overlay sticker or a logo (see [Regulation 3l](regulations:regulation:3l)).
clauses.zh: 带有合理可能让选手了解更多关于魔方状态信息的透明部分的魔方是禁止的。例外：半透明贴纸或logo（见[规则3l](regulations:regulation:3l)）。

clauses.en: [ADDITION] Examples of transparent parts that do not reveal more information about the state of the puzzle: internal parts of the puzzle mechanism, transparent Clock cases.
clauses.zh: [附加] 不透露更多有关魔方状态信息的透明部件举例：魔方的内部结构、透明的魔表外壳。

clauses.en: Any modifications to a puzzle that result in poor performance by a competitor are not grounds for additional attempts.
clauses.zh: 任何由于对魔方的修改导致的失常发挥都不能作为额外还原机会的理由。

clauses.en: For Clock, the following modifications are permitted:
clauses.zh: 对于魔表，以下修改是允许的：

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] For Clock, visual modifications that enhance the ability to determine the orientation of the puzzle are permitted, as traditional puzzle designs already provide this information.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 魔表可以通过对外观的修改增强其具体朝向的辨识度，因为传统的魔表设计已经提供了这些信息。

clauses.en: Visual modifications (e.g. paper inserts) are permitted, at the discretion of the WCA Delegate. Any modification must have 12 clear hour markers for each inner clock face, with a distinct indication at 12 o'clock that matches the original puzzle.
clauses.zh: 视觉效果的修改（例如自定义背景图），由WCA代表决定。任何修改必须能清楚地看到各内表盘的12个小时刻度，并且清楚的指明和原有插图一致的12点方向。

clauses.en: Puzzle design customizations that do not give an unfair advantage may be permitted, at the discretion of the WCA Delegate (e.g. checkerboard pattern clocks, faces with a custom design, tape on the side of the Clock).
clauses.zh: 不会产生对他人不公平的优势的设计可以被允许，由WCA代表决定（例如棋盘图案的表、自定义表面、魔表侧面的胶带等）。

clauses.en: Customizations which distinguish pins from other pins of the same side are permitted, at the discretion of the WCA Delegate.
clauses.zh: 允许可以区分同一面的不同按钮的设计，由WCA代表决定。

clauses.en: Logos anywhere on the puzzle, as long as the inner clock faces remain uncovered.
clauses.zh: 任意位置的logo，只要不要遮挡里面的表盘即可。

clauses.en: For Clock, loose pins (i.e. pins that can toggle or recede using gravity instead of being directly pressed) are not considered reasonable wear, and puzzles with such pins must not be permitted.
clauses.zh: 魔表上松动的立柱（例如会因为重力而不是人为按压就改变状态的立柱）不被认为是合理的磨损，有这样立柱的魔表不被允许。

clauses.en: Puzzles must be clean, and must not have any markings, elevated pieces, damage, or other differences that significantly distinguish any piece from a similar piece. Exception: a logo (see [Regulation 3l](regulations:regulation:3l)).
clauses.zh: 魔方必须干净清洁，且不得有任何记号、不平整的块、损伤，或者其他的一些特别之处使得可以分辨两个相似的块。例外：一个logo（见[规则3l](regulations:regulation:3l)）。

clauses.en: [EXAMPLE] There is a [Visual Guide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1m6THsA8fXRN7QFM4ApJbm6eVODKGbMLx/view) available for [Regulation 3j](regulations:regulation:3j).
clauses.zh: [举例] 对于[规则3j](regulations:regulation:3j)，这里有一个[可视化指南](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1m6THsA8fXRN7QFM4ApJbm6eVODKGbMLx/view)。

clauses.en: Puzzles are permitted to have reasonable wear, at the discretion of the WCA Delegate.
clauses.zh: 魔方允许有合理的磨损，由WCA代表决定。

clauses.en: Wear should be considered reasonable if it is a result of normal use of the puzzle and if it does not give significant additional information about the state of the puzzle (e.g. about the location of specific pieces).
clauses.zh: 如果磨损是正常使用魔方的结果，并且没有提供有关魔方状态的重要附加信息（例如：有关特定块的位置），则应该认为磨损是合理的。

clauses.en: Definition: Two pieces are similar to each other if they are identical in shape and size, or mirrored in shape and identical in size.
clauses.zh: 定义：如果两个块的大小一样，且形状一样或互为镜像，则称这两个块是“相似”的。

clauses.en: Corrugated/textured parts which permit the orientation of pieces to be distinguished by feel are not permitted for blindfolded events.
clauses.zh: 在盲拧项目中禁止使用通过触摸可区分方向的贴纸或贴片。

clauses.en: Puzzles should be approved by the WCA Delegate before use in the competition.
clauses.zh: 魔方在使用之前应该经过WCA代表的检查。

clauses.en: If a non-permitted puzzle is found during a round, the competitor must not continue to use the puzzle, and must submit a replacement.
clauses.zh: 如果在一个轮次中发现一个不被允许使用的魔方被使用，选手不能继续使用这个魔方，而必须提交一个替代魔方。

clauses.en: Penalty for attempts done with puzzles which are not permitted: disqualification of the attempt (DNF). The following exceptions apply:
clauses.zh: 使用不被允许的魔方的惩罚：取消当前还原成绩成绩（DNF）。以下情况例外：

clauses.en: [ADDITION] The WCA Delegate should not apply a listed exception if they believe the competitor tried to use a non-permitted puzzle on purpose.
clauses.zh: [附加] WCA代表如果认为选手故意使用不被允许的魔方，则不应该应用列出的例外。

clauses.en: If a non-permitted puzzle is found before a round is complete, affected results in the round may be replaced with extra attempts, at the discretion of the WCA Delegate.
clauses.zh: 如果在一个轮次结束前发现一个不被允许使用的魔方被使用，在本轮中受影响的成绩可以分别用一次额外还原来替代，由WCA代表决定。

clauses.en: A puzzle may have one or more logos on a colored part. If it does, it must have at most one colored part with a logo or multiple logos. Exception: For 4x4x4 Blindfolded, 5x5x5 Blindfolded, and 3x3x3 Multi-Blind, a puzzle must not have any logos.
clauses.zh: 魔方的有色部分可以有一个或多个logo。如果有，则logo只能出现在最多一个有色部分上面。例外：在四阶盲拧、五阶盲拧和三阶多盲项目中，魔方不允许有logo。

clauses.en: [ADDITION] Logos may feature any reasonable design that does not give a conspicuous advantage (e.g. encoding information that could be used to cheat), and leave the colored part clearly recognizable. Unconventional logos are only permitted at the discretion of the WCA Delegate.
clauses.zh: [附加] logo可以任意设计，但不能给还原带来明显的优势（例如可以用于作弊的编码信息），且原有有色部分的颜色必须依然可辩。非传统的logo是否允许由WCA代表决定。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] Logos are permitted for 3x3x3 Blindfolded, but not any other blindfolded events, including 3x3x3 Multi-Blind.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 带logo的魔方可以在三阶盲拧项目中使用，但不能在任何其它盲拧项目中使用，包括三阶多盲。

clauses.en: The logo must be placed on a center piece. Exceptions for puzzles that do not have center pieces:
clauses.zh: logo必须位于中心块上。除了下述没有中心块的魔方：

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] On NxNxN puzzles, a center piece is any piece with a single colored part. For example, the 5x5x5 Cube has 9 center pieces on each face.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 在N阶魔方中，中心块是任意一个只有一个颜色的块。例如，五阶魔方每个面有9个中心块。

clauses.en: For Pyraminx and 2x2x2, the logo may be on any piece.
clauses.zh: 对于金字塔和二阶魔方，logo可以位于任何一块上。

clauses.en: For Square-1, the logo must be on a piece in the equatorial slice.
clauses.zh: 对于Square-1，logo必须位于中层的某一块上。

clauses.en: The logo may be embossed, engraved, or consist of an overlay sticker.
clauses.zh: logo允许有凹凸或纹理。

clauses.en: All brands of puzzles and puzzle parts are permitted, as long as the puzzles comply with all WCA Regulations.
clauses.zh: 只要符合WCA规则，可以使用任何品牌的魔方及零部件。

clauses.en: A scrambler applies scramble sequences to the solved puzzles.
clauses.zh: 打乱员将复原的魔方按照打乱公式打乱。

clauses.en: Exception: for extra attempts for 5x5x5 Cube, 6x6x6 Cube, 7x7x7 Cube, and Megaminx, the scramble sequence may be applied to an unsolved puzzle, at the discretion of the WCA Delegate. This exception only applies to scramble sequences for extra attempts. When applying a scramble sequence to an unsolved puzzle, the scramble may begin in any orientation, the usual requirements in [Regulation 4d](regulations:regulation:4d) do not apply.
clauses.zh: 例外：对于五阶、六阶、七阶魔方及五魔方，额外尝试用的备用打乱可以在未复原的魔方上使用，由WCA代表决定。这个例外只对额外尝试的打乱有效。当使用未复原的魔方进行打乱时，打乱可以由任意朝向开始，不必遵循[规则4d](regulations:regulation:4d)中的通常要求。

clauses.en: [RECOMMENDATION] The WCA Delegate should use stronger discretion when determining whether or not the scramble sequence may be applied to an unsolved puzzle for 5x5x5 Cube and Megaminx.
clauses.zh: [建议] 对于五阶魔方以及五魔方，WCA代表应该更谨慎地决定是否要使用未复原的魔方进行打乱。

clauses.en: Competition scramble sequences must be generated using a current official version of an official WCA scramble program (available [via the WCA website](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/regulations/scrambles/)).
clauses.zh: 比赛打乱公式必须由当前版本的WCA官方打乱程序（可在[WCA网站上](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/regulations/scrambles/)获得）生成。

clauses.en: [RECOMMENDATION] The WCA Delegate should generate sufficient scramble sequences for the entire competition ahead of time, including spare scramble sequences for extra attempts.
clauses.zh: [建议] WCA代表应提前生成足够的打乱公式以供整个比赛使用，包括额外尝试用的备用打乱公式。

clauses.en: [REMINDER] If the WCA Delegate generates any additional scramble sequences during the competition, the scramble sequences must be saved.
clauses.zh: [提醒] 如果WCA代表在比赛期间生成了任何额外的打乱公式，这些打乱公式必须被存档。

clauses.en: Generated scramble sequences must not be inspected before the competition, and must not be filtered or selected in any way by the WCA Delegate.
clauses.zh: 对于生成的打乱公式，在比赛前WCA代表禁止查阅或以任何方式筛选它。

clauses.en: [REMINDER] The WCA Delegate must never re-generate any scramble sequences to replace other ones for the purpose of filtering. For example, it is not permitted to glance at the scramble sequences for a competition and generate the entire set again in order to generate "fairer" scramble sequences.
clauses.zh: [提醒] WCA代表禁止重新生成任何打乱公式来替代原有打乱公式。例如，不允许看一眼打乱公式，然后以“更公平”为由重新生成打乱公式。

clauses.en: Scramble sequences for a group must be available only to the WCA Delegate before the start of that group, and only available to the WCA Delegate and the scramblers for the group until it is finished. Exception: for 3x3x3 Fewest Moves, competitors receive scramble sequences during the round (see [Article E](regulations:article:E)).
clauses.zh: 在某一组选手比赛开始前，该组的打乱只有WCA代表可以看到；在该组比赛结束前只有WCA代表和打乱员可以看到。例外：对于三阶最少步，选手在比赛时收到打乱公式（见[规则E](regulations:article:E)）。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] In general, all official scramble sequences should be kept secret during the competition and published together after the end of the competition. In some cases (e.g. world records), the organization team may wish to release specific scramble sequences sooner after the end of a group.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 通常，所有官方打乱公式在比赛时应保密，赛后统一公开发布。特殊情况下（例如世界纪录），主办团队可以在该组比赛结束后提前公布特定的打乱公式。

clauses.en: [ADDITION] Competition organizers should ensure that scramblers, scramble sequences, and partially/fully scrambled puzzles are visually isolated from competitors (see [Regulation A2c](regulations:regulation:A2c)). For example, the scramblers may be located behind a wall, or a sufficiently high divider (e.g. a cardboard divider placed around the sides of a table where the scramblers are seated) may be used so that competitors are not able to see puzzles as the scramblers apply scramble sequences.
clauses.zh: [附加] 主办团队应该保证打乱员、打乱公式以及部分/完全打乱的魔方在视觉上与选手隔离（见[规则A2c](regulations:regulation:A2c)）。例如，打乱员可以在一堵墙后面，或使用一个充分高的遮挡（例如在打乱员的桌子周围放上纸盒遮挡）这样选手不能在打乱员打乱的时候看见被打乱的魔方。

clauses.en: The designated WCA Delegate for the competition must only give access to scramble sequences for future groups to other members of the organization team if they will be temporarily unavailable (e.g. competing themselves), and should give others access to the minimum possible amount of scrambles in this case.
clauses.zh: 本场比赛的指定WCA代表只能在自己会临时不在场（例如自己参加比赛）的情况下把后续组别的打乱交给主办团队的其他成员，且在这种情况下应该只提供尽可能少的打乱给其他成员。

clauses.en: Competitors, officials, and spectators must not photograph or otherwise record scramble sequences, unless permission has been granted by the WCA Delegate. This includes scramble sequences for finished groups. Exception: since the competitor is directly provided with the scramble sequence for a 3x3x3 Fewest Moves attempt, they may photograph it after submitting their attempt.
clauses.zh: 选手、工作人员以及观众禁止拍照或以其它方式记录打乱序列，除非已经获得WCA代表的允许。这包括已经完成的组别的打乱序列。例外：因为在三阶最少步尝试中选手是直接获得了打乱序列，他们可以在提交成绩后对其进行拍照。

clauses.en: Specification for a scramble program: An official scramble sequence must produce a random state from all states that require at least 2 moves to solve (equal probability for each state). The following additions/exceptions apply:
clauses.zh: 打乱程序要求：官方打乱公式必须达到一个从所有需要至少两步才能还原的状态中随机选择的状态（所有状态等概率），除了下述例外：

clauses.en: For blindfolded events, the scramble sequence must orient the puzzle randomly (equal probability for each orientation).
clauses.zh: 对于盲拧类项目，打乱公式必须使魔方朝向随机的方向（所有方向等概率）。

clauses.en: 2x2x2 Cube: The (random) state must require at least 4 moves to solve.
clauses.zh: 二阶魔方：打乱状态需要至少4步才能还原。

clauses.en: Skewb: The (random) state must require at least 7 moves to solve.
clauses.zh: 斜转魔方：打乱状态需要至少7步才能还原。

clauses.en: Square-1: The (random) state must require at least 11 moves to solve. The (random) state must allow a / move to be applied without a prior (X, Y) move (see [Regulation 12c](regulations:regulation:12c)).
clauses.zh: Square-1：打乱状态需要至少11步才能还原。这个（随机）状态必须能在不转动(X, Y)的前提下转动/（见[规则12c](regulations:regulation:12c)）。

clauses.en: 5x5x5 Cube, 6x6x6 Cube, 7x7x7 Cube, and Megaminx: sufficiently many random moves (instead of random state), at least 2 moves to solve.
clauses.zh: 五阶、六阶、七阶魔方及五魔方：采用随机转动产生打乱状态（而非随机产生状态），其状态需要至少2步才能还原。

clauses.en: Pyraminx: The (random) state must require at least 6 moves to solve.
clauses.zh: 金字塔魔方：打乱状态需要至少6步才能还原。

clauses.en: Each scramble sequence should be applied during a maximum time frame of 2 hours. This time frame starts when the scramble sequence is applied for the first time.
clauses.zh: 每个打乱公式应该在第一次使用该打乱公式后不超过2小时的时间段内使用。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] All attempts that have been started within the time frame follow the standard solving procedure (i.e. they are not stopped when the time frame of the relevant scramble sequence expires).
clauses.zh: [澄清] 只要在该时间段内开始的还原都可以按照正常程序进行（例如并不会因为其打乱超过了2小时的限制而被中止）。

clauses.en: Scrambling orientation:
clauses.zh: 打乱朝向：

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] Some puzzles use standard color schemes, except that white is replaced with black. In this case, black is the darkest color and must not be treated as white.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 有些魔方的配色仅仅是在标准配色基础上用黑色代替了白色。这种情况下，黑色是最暗的颜色，不能将其视作白色。

clauses.en: [ADDITION] It is permitted for the puzzle to change its orientation when it is moved from the scrambler to the solving station, as long as no one is attempting to influence the randomness of the orientation (see [Regulation A2e1](regulations:regulation:A2e1)).
clauses.zh: [附加] 在魔方从打乱区拿到比赛区的过程中允许改变其朝向，但禁止任何人影响其朝向的随机性。（见[规则 A2e1](regulations:regulation:A2e1)）。

clauses.en: NxNxN Cubes and Megaminx are scrambled starting with the white face (if not possible, then the lightest face) on the top and the darkest adjacent green face (if not possible, then the darkest adjacent face) on the front.
clauses.zh: N阶魔方及五魔方打乱时白色面（或最亮的面）朝上，最暗的相邻绿色面（或最暗的相邻面）朝前。

clauses.en: Pyraminx is scrambled starting with the yellow face (if not possible, then the lightest face) on the bottom and the green face (if not possible, then the darkest adjacent face) on the front.
clauses.zh: 金字塔打乱时黄色面（或最亮的面）朝下，绿色面（或最暗的相邻面）朝前。

clauses.en: Square-1 is scrambled starting with the darker color on front (out of the 2 possible scrambling orientations).
clauses.zh: Square-1打乱时更暗的面朝前（在两种可能的打乱方向中选择）。

clauses.en: Clock is scrambled starting with either side in front and 12 o'clock pointing up.
clauses.zh: 魔表打乱时任意一面朝前，12点方向朝上。

clauses.en: Skewb is scrambled starting with the white face (if not possible, then the lightest face) on top and the green face (if not possible, then the darkest adjacent face) on the front-left.
clauses.zh: 斜转魔方打乱时白色面（或最亮的面）朝上，绿色面（或最暗的相邻面）朝左前。

clauses.en: After scrambling a puzzle, the scrambler must verify that the puzzle is scrambled correctly. If the puzzle state is wrong, the scrambler must correct it (e.g. by solving the puzzle and applying the scramble sequence again).
clauses.zh: 打乱完成后，打乱员必须检查魔方是否被正确地打乱了。如果打乱状态是错的，该打乱员必须纠正它（例如将魔方还原后重新打乱）。

clauses.en: The following exceptions apply:
clauses.zh: 以下例外适用：

clauses.en: For 5x5x5 Cube, 6x6x6 Cube, 7x7x7 Cube, and Megaminx, it is not necessary to correct the puzzle state, at the discretion of the WCA Delegate.
clauses.zh: 对于五阶、六阶、七阶魔方及五魔方，可以不纠正错误的打乱状态，由WCA代表决定。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] For 5x5x5 Blindfolded, incorrect puzzle states must always be corrected.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 对于五阶盲拧，错误的打乱必须被纠正。

clauses.en: [RECOMMENDATION] The WCA Delegate should use stronger discretion when determining whether or not incorrect puzzle states for 5x5x5 Cube and Megaminx need to be corrected.
clauses.zh: [建议] WCA代表应该更谨慎地决定是否需要纠正五阶魔方或五魔方的打乱。

clauses.en: For Multi-Blind Solving, after scrambling all the cubes, the scrambler must verify there are no duplicate scrambles.
clauses.zh: 对于三阶多盲，打乱员必须在打乱完所有魔方之后确认没有重复的打乱。

clauses.en: After verifying the puzzle is scrambled correctly, the scrambler may pass the puzzle to another scrambler to verify. In this case, both scramblers should sign the scorecard.
clauses.zh: 在确认魔方已正确打乱后，打乱员可以将魔方交给另一名打乱员进行验证。在这种情况下，两名打乱员都应在成绩单上签名。

clauses.en: [RECOMMENDATION] All puzzles in the final round of a National Championship, Continental Championship or World Championship should be verified by a second scrambler.
clauses.zh: [建议] 在国家锦标赛、大洲锦标赛或者世界锦标赛的决赛中，所有打乱后的魔方应该由另一名打乱员进行检查。

clauses.en: Examples of puzzle defects include: popped parts, pieces twisted in place, and detached screws/caps/stickers.
clauses.zh: 魔方故障的例子包括：POP，某些块原地转，掉贴纸、贴片、盖子等。

clauses.en: If a puzzle defect occurs during an attempt, the competitor may choose to either repair the defect and continue the attempt, or to stop the attempt.
clauses.zh: 如果在某次还原中发生了魔方故障，选手可以选择修复魔方继续还原，或是停止还原。

clauses.en: If a competitor chooses to repair the puzzle, they must repair only the defective parts. Tools and/or parts of other puzzles must not be used to repair the original puzzle. Penalty: disqualification of the attempt (DNF).
clauses.zh: 如果选手选择修复魔方，他只能修复发生故障的块，其他块或工具禁止被用于修复。惩罚：取消当前还原成绩（DNF）。

clauses.en: Any repair to a puzzle must not give the competitor an advantage in solving the puzzle. Penalty: disqualification of the attempt (DNF).
clauses.zh: 对魔方的修复禁止给还原带来任何优势。惩罚：取消当前还原成绩（DNF）。

clauses.en: Permitted repairs:
clauses.zh: 允许的修复：

clauses.en: If any parts have fallen out or moved out of place, the competitor may place them back.
clauses.zh: 如果任何块掉出了它原有的位置，选手可以将它装回来。

clauses.en: If the competitor repairs the puzzle but finds that the puzzle is unsolvable later during the solve, they may disassemble and reassemble a maximum of 4 pieces to make the puzzle solvable.
clauses.zh: 如果选手修复魔方后在还原过程中发现魔方变得不可还原，他可以重新拆下并装上至多4个块使得魔方可被还原。

clauses.en: If the puzzle is unsolvable, and can be made solvable by rotating a single corner piece, the competitor may correct the corner piece by twisting it in place without disassembling the puzzle. If multiple corner pieces have been twisted as a result of puzzle defects, the competitor may correct these twists, as long as the number of pieces corrected by the competitor does not exceed the number of pieces twisted as a result of puzzle defects.
clauses.zh: 如果魔方无法还原，但通过旋转单个角块即可使其可还原，选手可以通过原地旋转角块来修正，而无需拆装魔方。如果由于魔方故障导致多个角块发生了旋转，选手可以纠正这些旋转，但前提是选手纠正的角块数量不得超过因魔方故障而旋转的角块数量。

clauses.en: During a blindfolded phase (see [Regulation B4](regulations:regulation:B4)), all repairs must be performed blindfolded. Penalty: disqualification of the attempt (DNF).
clauses.zh: 在盲拧阶段（见[规则B4](regulations:regulation:B4)），所有修复必须盲进行。惩罚：取消当前还原成绩（DNF）。

clauses.en: If some parts of the puzzle are physically detached or not fully placed at the end of the solve, the following regulations apply:
clauses.zh: 如果在结束还原时魔方的一些部分掉出或没有完全归位，则按照参考如下规则判定：

clauses.en: [EXAMPLE] Examples of parts physically detached, resulting in a solved state: one 3x3x3 center cap, one big cube center piece, an inner piece of a big cube.
clauses.zh: [举例] 某些块飞出，判定为还原的例子：三阶魔方的一个中心盖，高阶魔方的一个中心块，一个高阶魔方的内部块。

clauses.en: [EXAMPLE] Examples of parts physically detached, resulting in a DNF: two 3x3x3 center caps, two big cube center pieces, a 3x3x3 edge piece, a 4x4x4 edge piece ("wing"), any combination of two pieces that both have colored parts.
clauses.zh: [举例] 某些块飞出，判定为DNF的例子：三阶魔方的两个中心盖，两个高阶魔方的中心块，三阶魔方的一个棱块，四阶魔方的一个棱块，含有颜色的两个块的任意组合。

clauses.en: If one or more parts without colored faces are affected, the puzzle is considered solved.
clauses.zh: 一个或多个不含颜色块的部分受影响的情况，则判定为正常还原。

clauses.en: If one part with one colored face is affected, the puzzle is considered solved.
clauses.zh: 只有一个只含单颜色块的部分受影响，则判定为正常还原。

clauses.en: If more than one part with one colored face is affected, the puzzle is considered unsolved (DNF).
clauses.zh: 两个及以上只含单颜色块部分受影响，则判定为未还原（DNF）。

clauses.en: If one or more parts with more than one colored face are affected, the puzzle is considered unsolved (DNF).
clauses.zh: 一个及以上含多种颜色块的部分受影响，则判定为未还原（DNF）。

clauses.en: Regulations [5b5c](regulations:regulation:5b5c) and [5b5d](regulations:regulation:5b5d) supersede [5b5a](regulations:regulation:5b5a) and [5b5b](regulations:regulation:5b5b).
clauses.zh: [规则5b5c](regulations:regulation:5b5c)与[规则5b5d](regulations:regulation:5b5d)比[规则5b5a](regulations:regulation:5b5a)与[规则5b5b](regulations:regulation:5b5b)优先判定.

clauses.en: If a part is partially detached or not fully placed, its final position is the closest position in which the affected piece would normally fit within the puzzle mechanism, considering the current state of the puzzle. If the final position renders the piece solved, the piece is not considered to be affected by the puzzle defect.
clauses.zh: 如果一个魔方的部件部分掉出或没有完全归位，其最终位置由按照魔方结构通常可以安放的最近位置决定，并参考魔方当前的状态。如果最终位置显示该块已经复原，则该块被认为没有受到魔方故障的影响。

clauses.en: [EXAMPLE] There is a [Visual Guide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/15XszaCGNvy3Dk6X6qERzZWZaDH1RH04z/view) available for [Regulation 5b5f](regulations:regulation:5b5f).
clauses.zh: [举例] 对于[规则5b5f](regulations:regulation:5b5f)，这里有一个[可视化指南](https://drive.google.com/file/d/15XszaCGNvy3Dk6X6qERzZWZaDH1RH04z/view)。

clauses.en: [EXAMPLE] A 4x4x4 edge piece ("wing") twisted in place is considered solved.
clauses.zh: [举例] 一个四阶的翼棱在它自己的位置翻转的状态被认为是还原的。

clauses.en: [EXAMPLE] A corner affected by a corner twist is considered to be placed in a valid position, but such position does not render the piece solved.
clauses.zh: [举例] 一个旋转了的角块被认为是在它自己的位置，但这样的状态不能得出这块是复原的。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] If there are multiple pieces partially detached or not fully placed, their final position is assessed one at a time. The piece that is closest to an open position is assessed first, and is then considered to occupy that position. This process is repeated until all partially detached or not fully placed pieces have been assessed.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 如果有多个部分脱落或未完全归位的部件，其最终位置应逐一进行评估。最接近一个空位的部件优先被评估，并被视为占据该位置。重复此过程直到所有部分脱落或未完全归位的部件都被评估完成。

clauses.en: Definition: A part is one or more fully connected components from a group of puzzle components that remain connected and do not move relative to each other during ordinary operation of the puzzle (e.g. a 3x3x3 center cap, a Pyraminx tip, a 3x3x3 corner piece missing one face, one face of a 3x3x3 corner piece).
clauses.zh: 定义：一个“部分”指的是由一个或多个零件组成的、在常规操作中不会相对移动的、保持连接在一起的整体(例如：三阶魔方的中心盖、金字塔的小角、缺少一个面的三阶魔方的角块、三阶魔方的角块的一个面等)。

clauses.en: [REMINDER] If a competitor has a puzzle defect, this does not grant them the right to an extra attempt.
clauses.zh: [提醒] 魔方发生故障不能作为选手获得额外还原机会的理由。

clauses.en: The competitor is not permitted to cause a puzzle defect intentionally. Examples of intentionally causing puzzle defects: removing an attached center cap, rotating a corner piece, peeling a sticker.
clauses.zh: 选手不允许故意制造魔方故障。 故意制造魔方故障的例子：取下中心盖、旋转角块、撕下贴纸。

clauses.en: Exception: the competitor may intentionally cause a puzzle defect while repairing a previous puzzle defect (see [Regulation 5b3b](regulations:regulation:5b3b) and [Regulation 5b3c](regulations:regulation:5b3c)).
clauses.zh: 例外：选手在修复之前的故障的时候（见[规则5b3b](regulations:regulation:5b3b)和[规则5b3c](regulations:regulation:5b3c)）可以故意制造魔方故障。

clauses.en: Exception: if a competitor incorrectly fixes an existing puzzle defect, for example by rotating a corner piece in the wrong direction (see [Regulation 5b3c](regulations:regulation:5b3c)), this is not considered intentionally causing a puzzle defect.
clauses.zh: 例外：如果选手没有正确修复故障，例如向反方向旋转角块（见[规则5b3c](regulations:regulation:5b3c)），这种情况不被视为故意制造魔方故障。

clauses.en: Penalty for intentionally causing a puzzle defect: disqualification of the attempt (DNF).
clauses.zh: 对故意制造魔方故障的惩罚：取消当前还原成绩（DNF）。

clauses.en: Spectators must remain at least 1.5 meters away from the solving stations when they are in use.
clauses.zh: 观众距离正在使用的比赛区必须保持1.5米以上。

clauses.en: Lighting of the competition area must be given special attention. Lighting should be neutral, such that competitors can easily differentiate among the colors on the puzzles.
clauses.zh: 比赛区的光照必须特别注意。光照应使用白光以便选手可以更容易识别不同的颜色。

clauses.en: The competition area must be smoke-free.
clauses.zh: 比赛区严禁吸烟。

clauses.en: Solving station:
clauses.zh: 比赛位：

clauses.en: Definitions:
clauses.zh: 定义：

clauses.en: Speedsolving timer: An approved timer from the [Approved Timer List](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1UizYZOY4v-t7YnKcXas0hHzekX-NGuhW/view).
clauses.zh: 计时器：在[已批准计时器列表](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1UizYZOY4v-t7YnKcXas0hHzekX-NGuhW/view)中列出的被批准的计时器。

clauses.en: Mat: The mat on which the speedsolving timer is placed.
clauses.zh: 垫子：计时器所放置在的垫子。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] A full-size mat should have minimum dimensions of 30cm (left to right) by 25cm (front to back).
clauses.zh: [澄清] 全尺寸垫子的大小应至少达到 30厘米（左右）x 25厘米（前后）。

clauses.en: Timer: The speedsolving timer or a stopwatch (for longer attempts).
clauses.zh: 计时装置：计时器或秒表（对于长时间的尝试）。

clauses.en: Surface: The flat surface on which the speedsolving timer is placed. The mat is considered a part of the surface. The timer is not considered a part of the surface.
clauses.zh: 桌面：放置计时器的平面。垫子也被认为是桌面的一部分。计时器不算是桌面的一部分。

clauses.en: The speedsolving timer must be attached to the mat and placed on the surface, with the timer on the side of the mat nearest to the competitor.
clauses.zh: 计时器必须固定在垫子上并且放置在桌面上，且计时器位于垫子靠近选手的一端。

clauses.en: The organization team should modify speedsolving timers to be more robust against common incidents, for example by making the buttons more difficult to press by accident (e.g. by attaching O-rings around the buttons) and securing the battery more firmly (e.g. by padding the battery compartment).
clauses.zh: 主办团队应该对计时器进行修改，例如把按键变得更难意外按到（例如在按键周围加上O形环），以使得它更容易避免一些常见的意外，并且把电池固定得更加牢固（例如加一些垫物）。

clauses.en: If competitors do not remain at the same solving station for all of their attempts in a round, the competition area must have one or more Competitor Waiting Areas. Exception: rounds with individually scheduled attempts.
clauses.zh: 如果选手不会一直待在同一个比赛位完成整轮比赛，那么比赛区就必须有一个或多个选手等候区。例外：单独进行每次尝试的轮次。

clauses.en: Definition: A Competitor Waiting Area is an area in which competitors in a group wait to be called to a solving station.
clauses.zh: 定义：选手等候区是指一组选手在等待被叫到比赛区比赛时所待的区域。

clauses.en: [ADDITION] Competitors in a Competitor Waiting Area who are waiting between attempts should not be able to see the puzzles of the competitors on stage.
clauses.zh: [附加] 位于选手等候区等待比赛的选手不应该能看到正在比赛的魔方。

clauses.en: The WCA governs competitions for mechanical puzzles that are operated by twisting groups of pieces, commonly known as "twisty puzzles".
clauses.zh: WCA管理这类项目的比赛：机械的，通过旋转群或者块来操作，被广泛认为是“魔方”的谜题。

clauses.en: The official events of the WCA are:
clauses.zh: WCA的官方项目如下：

clauses.en: [ADDITION] Events other than those specified in [Regulation 9b](regulations:regulation:9b) may be held during a competition, but will be considered unofficial and therefore will not be included in the official results of the competition.
clauses.zh: [附加] [规则9b](regulations:regulation:9b)以外的项目或形式也可以进行，但将作为非官方项目，并因此不会包含在比赛的官方成绩中。

clauses.en: 3x3x3 Cube, 2x2x2 Cube, 4x4x4 Cube, 5x5x5 Cube, 3x3x3 One-Handed, Clock, Megaminx, Pyraminx, Skewb, and Square-1.
clauses.zh: 三阶魔方、二阶魔方、四阶魔方、五阶魔方、三阶单手、魔表、五魔方、金字塔、斜转以及Square-1。

clauses.en: Full round format for these events: "Average of 5".
clauses.zh: 这些项目每轮的比赛形式为：“5次取去尾平均”。

clauses.en: Cutoff format for these events: "Best of 2" cutoff phase for "Average of 5".
clauses.zh: 有及格线轮次的比赛形式为：第一阶段“2次取最快”，第二阶段“5次取去尾平均”。

clauses.en: 6x6x6 Cube and 7x7x7 Cube.
clauses.zh: 六阶魔方和七阶魔方。

clauses.en: Full round format for these events: "Mean of 3".
clauses.zh: 这些项目每轮的比赛形式为：“3次取平均”。

clauses.en: Cutoff format for these events: "Best of 1" cutoff phase for "Mean of 3".
clauses.zh: 有及格线轮次的比赛形式为：第一阶段“1次取最快”，第二阶段“3次取平均”。

clauses.en: 3x3x3 Blindfolded.
clauses.zh: 三阶盲拧。

clauses.en: Full round format for this event: "Best of 5".
clauses.zh: 这个项目每轮的比赛形式为：“5次取最快”。

clauses.en: For this event, the WCA also recognizes "Average of 5" rankings and records, outside of the competition format. The "Average of 5" statistic does not affect the competitor's ranking in a "Best of 5" round, which is based on the best result (see [Regulation 9f6](regulations:regulation:9f6) and [Regulation 9f12](regulations:regulation:9f12)).
clauses.zh: 对于这个项目，WCA同时承认比赛形式之外的“5次取去尾平均”排名及纪录。“5次取去尾平均”的统计并不影响选手在“5次取最快”轮次中的排名（即依然根据最好成绩排名，见[规则9f6](regulations:regulation:9f6)和[规则9f12](regulations:regulation:9f12)）。

clauses.en: 3x3x3 Fewest Moves.
clauses.zh: 三阶最少步。

clauses.en: Full round formats for this event: "Best of X" (where X is 1 or 2) or "Mean of 3".
clauses.zh: 这个项目每轮的比赛形式为：“X次取最好”（X可取1，2）及“3次取平均”。

clauses.en: Cutoff formats for this event: "Best of 1" cutoff phase for "Best of 2" or "Best of X" (where X is 1 or 2) cutoff phase for "Mean of 3".
clauses.zh: 有及格线轮次的比赛形式为：第一阶段“1次取最好”，第二阶段“2次取最好”；或者第一阶段“X次取最好”（X可取1，2），第二阶段“3次取平均”。

clauses.en: 3x3x3 Multi-Blind.
clauses.zh: 三阶多盲。

clauses.en: Full round formats for this event: "Best of X" (where X is 1, 2, or 3).
clauses.zh: 这个项目每轮的比赛形式为：“X次取最好”（X可取1，2，3）。

clauses.en: Cutoff formats for this event: "Best of X" (where X is 1 or 2) cutoff phase for "Best of Y" (where Y is 2 or 3, and Y > X).
clauses.zh: 有及格线轮次的比赛形式为：第一阶段“X次取最好”（X可取1，2），第二阶段“Y次取最好”（Y可取2或3且Y > X）。

clauses.en: 4x4x4 Blindfolded and 5x5x5 Blindfolded.
clauses.zh: 四阶盲拧和五阶盲拧。

clauses.en: Full round format for these events: "Best of 3".
clauses.zh: 这些项目每轮的比赛形式为：“3次取最快”。

clauses.en: For these events, the WCA also recognizes "Mean of 3" rankings and records, outside of the competition format. The "Mean of 3" statistic does not affect the competitor's ranking in a "Best of 3" round, which is based on the best result (see [Regulation 9f6](regulations:regulation:9f6) and [Regulation 9f12](regulations:regulation:9f12)).
clauses.zh: 对于这些项目，WCA同时承认比赛形式之外的“3次取平均”排名及纪录。“3次取平均”的统计并不影响选手在“3次取最快”轮次中的排名（即依然根据最好成绩排名，见[规则9f6](regulations:regulation:9f6)和[规则9f12](regulations:regulation:9f12)）。

clauses.en: The Head to Head format (see [Article I](regulations:article:I)) is available as follows:
clauses.zh: 在以下情形中，可以使用“一对一”比赛形式（见[附则I](regulations:article:I)）：

clauses.en: The Head to Head format is available for the following events: 3x3x3 Cube, 4x4x4 Cube, 3x3x3 Blindfolded, and 3x3x3 One-Handed.
clauses.zh: 这些项目可以使用“一对一”比赛形式：三阶魔方、四阶魔方、三阶盲拧以及三阶单手。

clauses.en: The Head to Head format may only be used for the final round of an event.
clauses.zh: “一对一”比赛形式只可以在决赛中使用。

clauses.en: The results of a round are measured as follows:
clauses.zh: 一轮比赛的比赛结果按以下方式衡量和记录：

clauses.en: All timed results under 10 minutes, except for 3x3x3 Multi-Blind, are measured and truncated to hundredths of a second. All timed averages and means under 10 minutes are measured and rounded to the nearest hundredth of a second.
clauses.zh: 除三阶多盲外，所有小于10分钟的计时结果向下取整至百分秒。所有小于10分钟的平均、去尾平均结果四舍五入取整至百分秒。

clauses.en: All timed results of 10 minutes or more, as well as all times for 3x3x3 Multi-Blind results, are measured and truncated to seconds. All timed averages and means over 10 minutes are measured and rounded to the nearest second (e.g. X.49 becomes X, X.50 becomes X+1).
clauses.zh: 所有10分钟及以上的计时结果以及三阶多盲的时间，向下取整至秒。所有超过10分钟的平均、去尾平均结果四舍五入取整至秒（例如：X.49计为X，而X.50计为X+1）。

clauses.en: [ADDITION] For 3x3x3 Multi-Blind, the judge should record the number of puzzles solved, the number of puzzles attempted, and the final time. For example, if the competitor solves 3 cubes out of 5 attempted cubes in 40 minutes and 30 seconds, the judge should write down 3/5 40:30.
clauses.zh: [附加] 对于三阶多盲，裁判应当记录还原的魔方数、尝试的魔方数以及最终时间。例如：如果选手在40分30秒的时间里还原了5个魔方中的3个，裁判应该记下“3/5 40:30”。

clauses.en: The result of an attempt is recorded as DNF (Did Not Finish) if the attempt is disqualified or unsolved/unfinished.
clauses.zh: 如果还原被取消资格或没有还原，则该结果被记录为DNF（未还原）。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] The result of an attempt should be a DNF if the competitor began the attempt by indicating that they are ready (see [Regulation A3b2](regulations:regulation:A3b2)) but the attempt was disqualified.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 当选手开始尝试，即确认准备好（见[规则A3b2](regulations:regulation:A3b2)），但因故被取消成绩，那么这次尝试的结果应该是DNF。

clauses.en: If a competitor violates a regulation clearly enough that the attempt is certain to be disqualified, the judge should immediately stop the attempt. If the judge is uncertain or a dispute could be disruptive (e.g. because an extra attempt could delay the competition), the judge should consult the WCA Delegate.
clauses.zh: 当选手明显违反了规则，这次尝试确定要被取消资格的时候，裁判应该立即停止这次还原尝试。如果裁判不确定或者可能会对比赛造成其他干扰时（例如：额外增加一次复原会拖延比赛），裁判应该咨询WCA代表。

clauses.en: The result of an attempt is recorded as DNS (Did Not Start) if the competitor was eligible for the attempt and did not start it (see [Regulation A3b2](regulations:regulation:A3b2)).
clauses.zh: 如果选手具备某次尝试的资格但未开始尝试，则该次尝试的结果被记录为DNS（未开始）（见[规则A3b2](regulations:regulation:A3b2)）。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] If the competitor did not qualify for an attempt (e.g. in a Cutoff Round), they have no result for the attempt.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 如果选手未获得某次尝试的资格（例如，在有及格线轮次中），则该次尝试没有成绩记录。

clauses.en: If a competitor has no results or only has DNS results for a round, no results are recorded.
clauses.zh: 如果选手在一轮比赛中没有成绩或者只有DNS成绩，则不记录成绩。

clauses.en: In a Head to Head round, if a competitor starts no attempts, no results are recorded for that match for them or for their opponent (see [Regulation I2h](regulations:regulation:I2h)).
clauses.zh: 在“一对一”轮次中，如果选手没有开始任何尝试，则在该场对决中不记录这位选手及其对手的成绩（见[规则I2h](regulations:regulation:I2h)）。

clauses.en: For "Best of X" formats, each competitor is allotted X attempts. The best result of these attempts determines the competitor's ranking in the round. Exception: for Dual Rounds (see [Regulation 9v4](regulations:regulation:9v4)), the best result from either round determines the competitor's ranking.
clauses.zh: 在“X次取最快”的比赛形式中，每个选手有X次还原机会，这些还原中最好的成绩作为选手在该轮排名的依据。例外：在双重轮中（见[规则9v4](regulations:regulation:9v4)），选手的名次由其在任意一轮中获得的更好的成绩决定。

clauses.en: For "Best of X" formats, a DNF or DNS is the worst possible result.
clauses.zh: 在“X次取最快”的比赛形式中，DNF或DNS视为最坏成绩。

clauses.en: For the "Average of 5" format, competitors are allotted 5 attempts. Of these 5 attempts, the best and worst attempts are removed, and the arithmetic mean of the remaining 3 attempts determines the competitor's ranking in the round. Exception: for Dual Rounds (see [Regulation 9v4](regulations:regulation:9v4)), the best average from either round determines the competitor's ranking.
clauses.zh: 在“5次取去尾平均”的比赛形式中，每个选手有5次还原机会，在这5次还原中去掉最好和最坏的成绩，剩下3次成绩的算术平均值作为选手在该轮排名的依据。例外：在双重轮中（见[规则9v4](regulations:regulation:9v4)），选手的名次由其在任意一轮中获得的更好的平均成绩决定。

clauses.en: For the "Average of 5" format, one DNF or DNS is permitted to count as the competitor's worst result of the round. If a competitor has more than one DNF and/or DNS result in the round, their average result for the round is DNF.
clauses.zh: 在“5次取去尾平均”的比赛形式中，DNF或DNS视为最坏成绩。如果一个选手有不止一个DNF和/或DNS，则他该轮的平均成绩为DNF。

clauses.en: For the "Mean of 3" format, competitors are allotted 3 attempts. The arithmetic mean of the 3 attempts determines the competitor's ranking in the round. Exception: for Dual Rounds (see [Regulation 9v4](regulations:regulation:9v4)), the better mean from either round determines the competitor's ranking.
clauses.zh: 在“3次取平均”的比赛形式中，每个选手有3次还原机会，这3次成绩的算术平均值作为选手在该轮排名的依据。例外：在双重轮中（见[规则9v4](regulations:regulation:9v4)），选手的名次由其在任意一轮中获得的更好的平均成绩决定。

clauses.en: For the "Mean of 3" format, if the competitor has at least one DNF or DNS result, their average result for the round is DNF.
clauses.zh: 在“3次取平均”的比赛形式中，如果一个选手有DNF或DNS，则他该轮的平均成绩为DNF。

clauses.en: For "Best of X" formats, the following are used to compare results:
clauses.zh: 在“X次取最快”的比赛形式中，各个成绩按以下准则排序：

clauses.en: For timed results, "better" is defined as the shorter time.
clauses.zh: 对于计时结果，“更好”定义为更短的时间。

clauses.en: For 3x3x3 Fewest Moves, "better" is defined as the shorter solution length.
clauses.zh: 对于三阶最少步，“更好”定义为更短的解法长度。

clauses.en: For 3x3x3 Multi-Blind, rankings are assessed based on the number of puzzles solved minus the number of puzzles not solved, where a greater difference is better. If the difference is less than 0, or if only 1 puzzle is solved, the attempt is considered unsolved (DNF). If competitors achieve the same result, rankings are assessed based on total time, where the shorter recorded time is better. If competitors achieve the same result and the same time, rankings are assessed based on the number of puzzles the competitors failed to solve, where fewer unsolved puzzles are better.
clauses.zh: 对于三阶多盲，排名取决于还原的魔方个数减去未还原的魔方个数，其差越大越好。如果该差小于0或只还原了1个魔方，此次尝试视为未还原（DNF）。如果两个选手一样，排名取决于总时间，时间越短越好。如果两个选手还一样，排名取决于未还原魔方的个数，个数越少越好。

clauses.en: For "Mean of 3" and "Average of 5" formats, rankings are assessed based on the ordering of the averages/means of the competitors, where "better" is the smaller recorded result.
clauses.zh: 在“3次取平均”和“5次取去尾平均”的比赛形式中，排名取决于选手的平均成绩，“更好”定义为记录的成绩的更小的值。

clauses.en: For "Mean of 3" and "Average of 5" formats, if two or more competitors achieve identical average/mean results, rankings are assessed based on the best attempt per competitor, where "better" is defined as the smaller recorded result.
clauses.zh: 在“3次取平均”和“5次取去尾平均”的比赛形式中，如果多个选手的平均成绩一样，排名取决于他们的最好时间，“更好”定义为记录的成绩的更小的值。

clauses.en: Competitors who achieve the same result receive an identical ranking.
clauses.zh: 如果两个选手的成绩相同，则他们排名并列。

clauses.en: For Head to Head rounds:
clauses.zh: 对于“一对一”轮次：

clauses.en: Competitors are allotted attempts as described in [Article I](regulations:article:I).
clauses.zh: 每个选手的还原机会如[附则I](regulations:article:I)所述。

clauses.en: The winner of the Final Match is ranked first. The loser of the Final Match is ranked second. The winner of the Third Place Match is ranked third. The loser of the Third Place Match is ranked fourth. All other competitors are ranked based on the highest stage reached, with their best single within the round acting as a tiebreaker.
clauses.zh: 决赛胜者为第一名，决赛败者为第二名。三四名决赛的胜者为第三名，败者为第四名。其余选手按照所进入的最高阶段进行排名，在同一阶段内，则以该轮次中的最佳单次成绩排名。

clauses.en: [EXAMPLE] The four competitors eliminated at the Quarterfinal Stage have best single times of 5.00 seconds, 5.10 seconds, 5.20 seconds and 5.30 seconds and are ranked fifth, sixth, seventh, and eighth respectively.
clauses.zh: [举例] 在四分之一决赛阶段被淘汰的四名选手，其最佳单次成绩分别为5.00秒、5.10秒、5.20秒和5.30秒，依次排在第五、第六、第七和第八名。

clauses.en: A Cutoff Round is a round with a "Best of X" cutoff phase and a cutoff requirement (e.g. "Best of 2" with a cutoff requirement of strictly better than 2 minutes). If the competitor satisfies the cutoff requirement in at least one of their cutoff phase attempts, they are eligible for the remaining attempts. Attempts from the cutoff phase count towards the full round format.
clauses.zh: 有及格线轮次是有一个由“X次取最好”的形式加上一个及格线要求的第一阶段（例如“2次取最好”，及格线要求为成绩在2分钟以内（不含））的轮次。选手只有在第一个阶段中至少有一次成绩达到及格线才可以继续第二阶段的还原。第一阶段的成绩计入整轮的成绩计算。

clauses.en: Results of official WCA competitions must be listed on the WCA world rankings.
clauses.zh: WCA官方比赛的成绩必须被列入WCA全球排名。

clauses.en: The WCA recognizes the following types of regional records: national records, continental records, and world records.
clauses.zh: WCA承认以下几类纪录：地区纪录，大洲纪录，世界纪录。

clauses.en: A regional record is recognized when a new result is equal to or better than the existing record. Exception: see [Regulation 9i2](regulations:regulation:9i2).
clauses.zh: 当一项新的成绩等于或优于现有纪录时，即可被认定为地区纪录。例外：见[规则9i2](regulations:regulation:9i2)。

clauses.en: All the results of a round are considered to take place on the last calendar date of the round, based on the local time at the competition location. If a regional record is achieved multiple times on the same calendar date, only the best result is recognized as breaking that regional record. For competitions with multiple physical locations (i.e. "3x3x3 Fewest Moves simultaneous competitions"), the calendar date is the latest date at any competition location.
clauses.zh: 同一轮中的所有纪录都视为在该轮最后一天产生，以赛场当地时间为准。如果同一个纪录在一天内多次被打破或打平，则只有最好的那个成绩被认定为打破了该纪录。对于在多个地方进行的比赛（即“三阶最少步同步赛”），其日期以所有场地中最晚的日期为准。

clauses.en: If the WCA Regulations for an event are changed, existing regional records stand until they are broken under the new WCA Regulations.
clauses.zh: 如果对于某个项目的WCA规则被修改了，已有的纪录予以保留，直到它们在新规则下被打破。

clauses.en: Single results achieved in a Head to Head round are eligible for ranking and regional records. No average ranking or regional record may be established in a Head to Head round.
clauses.zh: 在“一对一”轮次中取得的单次成绩可以参与排名、打破纪录。但在“一对一”轮次中不会产生平均成绩或其对应的排名、纪录等。

clauses.en: Each event must be held at most once per competition.
clauses.zh: 每个项目在一场比赛中只能被举行一次。

clauses.en: All competitors may participate in all events of a competition, except in cases specifically approved by the WCA Competition Announcement Team.
clauses.zh: 所有选手都可以参加一场比赛的所有项目，除非是WCA赛事公示组批准的特殊情况。

clauses.en: Each round must be completed before any following round of the same event can start. The following exceptions apply:
clauses.zh: 所有项目当轮的比赛必须在该项目下一轮比赛可以开始前结束。以下情形例外：

clauses.en: Extra attempts may be given at any point during a competition to replace an attempt that was initially invalid, but must not be given after the competition has ended (see [Regulation 9u](regulations:regulation:9u)). An attempt is considered invalid if an extra attempt is required to be granted.
clauses.zh: 用于替换之前无效尝试的额外尝试机会可以在比赛中的任意时间给到选手，但不能在比赛结束之后（见[规则9u](regulations:regulation:9u)）。如果需要给予额外的尝试机会，则（原本的）该次尝试被视为无效。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] A DNF Result is generally considered a valid result. Extra attempts must not be given for using a non-permitted puzzle that is only found after the round is complete (see [Regulation 3k2a](regulations:regulation:3k2a)).
clauses.zh: [澄清] DNF通常被视为有效结果。对于在轮次结束后才发现使用了不被允许的魔方的情况，不得给予额外的尝试（见[规则3k2a](regulations:regulation:3k2a)）。

clauses.en: [EXAMPLE] Examples of an invalid attempt: an attempt within the scope of [Regulation 11i1](regulations:regulation:11i1) that was incorrectly scrambled, attempts where the results are no longer retrievable (e.g. a missing scorecard).
clauses.zh: [举例] 无效尝试的例子：在[规则11i1](regulations:regulation:11i1)所列情形中出现的打乱错误的尝试、无法获得结果的尝试（例如：成绩单丢失）。

clauses.en: For Dual Rounds, the second round may start before the first round is completed. This is because progression to the second round does not depend upon the results of the first round (see [Regulation 9v5](regulations:regulation:9v5)).
clauses.zh: 对于双重轮，第二轮可以在第一轮结束前开始。这是因为晋级至第二轮不依赖于第一轮的成绩（见[规则 9v5](regulations:regulation:9v5)）。

clauses.en: Events must have at most four rounds.
clauses.zh: 所有项目至多只能有四轮。

clauses.en: Rounds with 99 or fewer competitors must have at most two subsequent rounds.
clauses.zh: 少于100名选手的轮次之后至多还能有2轮。

clauses.en: Rounds with 15 or fewer competitors must have at most one subsequent round.
clauses.zh: 少于16名选手的轮次之后至多还能有1轮。

clauses.en: Rounds with 7 or fewer competitors must not have subsequent rounds.
clauses.zh: 少于8名选手的轮次只能是最后一轮。

clauses.en: For the purposes of counting the number of rounds per event:
clauses.zh: 按以下方式计算项目轮数：

clauses.en: Cutoff Rounds count as one round.
clauses.zh: 有及格线轮次记为一轮。

clauses.en: Dual Rounds count as two rounds.
clauses.zh: 双重轮记为两轮。

clauses.en: Head to Head rounds count as one round.
clauses.zh: “一对一”轮次记为一轮。

clauses.en: If an event has multiple rounds, then:
clauses.zh: 如果某个项目有多轮，那么：

clauses.en: At least 25% of competitors must be eliminated between consecutive rounds of the same event. Exception: Dual Rounds (see [Regulation 9v5](regulations:regulation:9v5)).
clauses.zh: 同一项目相邻两轮间至少有25%的选手被淘汰。例外：双重轮（见[规则9v5](regulations:regulation:9v5)）。

clauses.en: The competitors who advance to the next round must be determined by ranking (best X competitors) or by result (all competitors with a better result than X) in the preceding round.
clauses.zh: 选手的晋级与否必须取决于前一轮的排名（前X名选手）或成绩（所有成绩好于X的选手）。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] Result refers to the single or average that determines the ranking of the corresponding round.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 成绩指的是决定相应轮次排名的单次或者平均成绩。

clauses.en: For each round, the format, time limit, cutoff requirement, and advancement conditions must be announced before the round starts, and should not be changed after it has begun. Changes must be made at the discretion of the WCA Delegate, who must carefully consider the fairness of the change.
clauses.zh: 对于每一轮，比赛形式、时限、及格线以及晋级条件必须在该轮开始之前公布，以及不应该在该轮开始之后修改。修改必须由WCA代表决定，WCA代表必须认真考虑修改的公平性。

clauses.en: [ADDITION] An additional round of an event must not be added after the final round of that event has started, unless all competitors achieving podium places in the existing final round agree to the change.
clauses.zh: [附加] 某项目的决赛开始后，禁止增加额外轮次，除非获得领奖台位置的所有选手均同意增加。

clauses.en: [REMINDER] An additional round must not be added after a Head to Head round, since that Head to Head round would then no longer be the final round of an event (see [Regulation 9b7b](regulations:regulation:9b7b)).
clauses.zh: [提醒] 在“一对一”轮次之后禁止增加额外轮次，因为该“一对一”轮次将不再是该项目的最终轮（见[规则9b7b](regulations:regulation:9b7b)）。

clauses.en: Exception: for competitions designated as a National Championship or Continental Championship, the organization team may amend advancement conditions to reserve spaces for competitors representing the relevant region. A maximum of 8 spaces or 50% of spaces in the following round, whichever is the lower, may be reserved in this way. For a Head to Head round, 100% of spaces may be reserved in this way. For a round with reserved spaces, the competitors advancing from the previous round are a reserved number of best competitors representing the relevant region, followed by the remaining best competitors representing any region.
clauses.zh: 例外：对于国家锦标赛和大洲锦标赛，主办团队可以修改晋级条件，用以为该相关地区的选手保留晋级名额。最多8个或50%的下一轮的名额（取更少者）可以通过这种方式保留。对于“一对一”轮次，可以用这种方式保留100%的名额。对于具有保留名额的轮次，从前一轮晋级的选手为：预留数额的排名最靠前的代表相关地区的选手，以及剩下选手中排名最靠前的代表任意地区的选手。

clauses.en: [ADDITION] If there are not enough competitors representing the relevant region to fill the reserved spaces, they are replaced with the best competitors representing any region.
clauses.zh: [附加] 如果没有足够预留名额的相关地区选手，这些名额将由代表任意地区的排名最靠前的选手补充。

clauses.en: [ADDITION] For a competition designated as both a World Championship and a Continental Championship and/or National Championship, this exception does not apply. For a competition designated as both a Continental Championship and a National Championship, spaces may only be reserved for competitors representing the relevant continent.
clauses.zh: [附加] 对于同时被指定为世界锦标赛和大洲锦标赛和/或国家锦标赛的比赛，此例外不适用。对于同时被指定为大洲锦标赛和国家锦标赛的比赛，预留名额只能为代表相关大洲的选手保留。

clauses.en: [RECOMMENDATION] Any use of reserved spaces should be clearly announced before the competition.
clauses.zh: [建议] 任何预留名额的使用应在比赛前明确宣布。

clauses.en: If a qualifying competitor withdraws from a round, they may be replaced by the best-ranked non-qualifying competitor from the preceding round.
