clauses.en: If the parts of the puzzle are not fully aligned, then the competitor may align the faces, as long as misalignments stay within the limits of [Regulation 10f](regulations:regulation:10f) (see [Regulation A3c2](regulations:regulation:A3c2)).
clauses.zh: 如果魔方的一些块没有对齐，选手可以将它们对齐，但仅限于[规则10f](regulations:regulation:10f)所描述的限度以内（见[规则A3c2](regulations:regulation:A3c2)）。

clauses.en: Blindfolded phase:
clauses.zh: 盲拧阶段：

clauses.en: The competitor dons the blindfold to start the blindfolded phase.
clauses.zh: 选手戴上眼罩以开始盲拧阶段。

clauses.en: Until the competitor applies the first move to the puzzle, they may remove the blindfold to return to the memorization phase.
clauses.zh: 直到选手第一次转动魔方之前，他都可以取下眼罩以回到记忆阶段。

clauses.en: The competitor must not apply moves or intentional changes in alignment to the puzzle before they have fully donned the blindfold. Penalty: disqualification of the attempt (DNF).
clauses.zh: 在完全戴上眼罩前选手禁止转动魔方或有意改变魔方错位程度。惩罚：取消此次还原资格（DNF）。

clauses.en: As soon as the competitor applies the first move to the puzzle, the judge must ensure that there is a sight blocker (e.g. a sheet of paper or cardboard) between the competitor's face and the puzzle.
clauses.zh: 从选手开始转动的时候开始，裁判就必须确保有一个不透明的遮挡物（例如一张纸或硬纸板）挡在选手的脸和魔方之间。

clauses.en: [ADDITION] If the judge forgot to put a sight blocker and the WCA Delegate does not suspect that the competitor intentionally violated any WCA Regulations, the original attempt may stand.
clauses.zh: [附加] 如果裁判忘记使用遮挡物，并且WCA代表没有怀疑选手故意违反任何WCA规则，则原来那次尝试的结果可以保留。

clauses.en: In all cases, the competitor must wear the blindfold such that their view of the puzzle would still clearly be blocked if the sight blocker were not in the way.
clauses.zh: 无论什么情况，选手必须戴着眼罩，使得即便将遮挡物移去他仍然看不到魔方。

clauses.en: A sight blocker must be positioned such that the competitor's view of the puzzle would still clearly be blocked if they were not wearing a blindfold.
clauses.zh: 遮挡物必须放置在能确保即使在选手没有佩戴眼罩时，它仍然能明确地遮挡住选手观察魔方的视线的位置上。

clauses.en: If the judge and competitor agree beforehand, or if required by the organization team, a suitable object (e.g. a music stand, the surface of the table) placed by the competitor may be used as the sight blocker. The competitor must make a reasonable attempt to place the sight blocker themselves. Penalty: disqualification of the attempt (DNF). If the sight blocker is not positioned such that the competitor's view of the puzzle would still clearly be blocked if they were not wearing a blindfold, an extra sight blocker should be placed by the judge.
clauses.zh: 如果裁判和选手事先达成一致，或者主办团队要求，选手可以使用一个合适的物品（例如：乐谱架或桌面）作为遮挡物。选手必须尽力自己放好遮挡物。惩罚：取消此次还原资格（DNF）。如果遮挡物未能正确放置，以至于不能明确地遮挡住选手观察魔方的视线（假设选手没有佩戴眼罩），裁判应当放置一个额外的遮挡物。

clauses.en: The competitor must not look at the puzzle at any point during the blindfolded phase. Penalty: disqualification of the attempt (DNF).
clauses.zh: 在盲拧阶段选手禁止在任何时候看到魔方。惩罚：取消此次还原资格（DNF）。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] For 3x3x3 Blindfolded, competitors are permitted to determine the location of a permitted logo (see [Regulation 3l](regulations:regulation:3l)) by touch during the blindfolded phase.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 对于三阶盲拧，选手在盲拧阶段允许通过触摸来确定允许的logo的位置（见[规则3l](regulations:regulation:3l)）。

clauses.en: Stopping the solve:
clauses.zh: 结束还原：

clauses.en: When using the speedsolving timer, the competitor stops the solve by releasing the puzzle and then stopping the timer.
clauses.zh: 当使用计时器时，选手通过放下魔方并停止计时器以结束还原。

clauses.en: If a stopwatch is in use in addition to the speedsolving timer, the judge stops the stopwatch as soon as the competitor stops the solve.
clauses.zh: 当秒表和计时器同时使用时，裁判在选手结束还原的时候立刻停止秒表。

clauses.en: When using a stopwatch as the only timer, the competitor stops the solve by releasing the puzzle and notifying the judge that they have stopped the solve. The judge stops the stopwatch as soon as the competitor does this.
clauses.zh: 当使用秒表时，选手放下魔方并提示裁判还原结束，裁判此时立刻停止秒表。

clauses.en: The competitor's default notification signal consists of releasing the puzzle(s) from their hands and placing their hands on the surface, with palms down. The competitor and the judge may agree on another appropriate notification before the start of the attempt.
clauses.zh: 默认情况下，选手放下魔方并且把双手掌心向下放在桌面上表示结束还原。选手和裁判可以在开始还原之前协商别的合适的方式。

clauses.en: If the competitor is not touching the puzzle, they may remove the blindfold before they stop the timer. They must not touch the puzzle until the end of the solve. Penalty for touching the puzzle: disqualification of the attempt (DNF).
clauses.zh: 如果已经放下魔方，选手可以在停止计时器前摘下眼罩，但直到计时器停止之前他不可以再触碰魔方。触碰魔方的惩罚：取消此次还原资格（DNF）。

clauses.en: Standard speed solving procedures are followed, as described in [Article A](regulations:article:A) (Speed Solving). Additional regulations that supersede the corresponding procedures in [Article A](regulations:article:A) are described below.
clauses.zh: 主要遵循速拧规则，见[规则A](regulations:article:A)（速拧）。与[规则A](regulations:article:A)中的速拧规则不同的附加规则见下文。

clauses.en: During the solve, the competitor must use only one hand to operate the puzzle. Penalty: disqualification of the attempt (DNF).
clauses.zh: 在还原过程中，选手只可以使用一只手操作魔方。惩罚：取消此次还原资格（DNF）。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] The competitor may use both hands during inspection.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 选手在观察时可以使用双手。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] The competitor is not required to use the same solving hand for different attempts of the same round.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 对于同一轮的不同还原，选手可以使用不同的手。

clauses.en: If a puzzle defect occurs, and the competitor chooses to repair it, they must repair it using only the solving hand. Penalty: disqualification of the attempt (DNF).
clauses.zh: 如果发生了魔方故障，并且选手选择修复故障，他必须使用他用于还原的那一只手修复。惩罚：取消此次还原资格（DNF）。

clauses.en: If other body parts of the competitor come in contact with the puzzle or parts of the puzzle without the competitor's intention and without applying moves, this is not considered operating the puzzle, at the discretion of the judge.
clauses.zh: 如果选手在无意中身体的其他部分和魔方或者魔方的一部分发生了触碰，并且没有发生转动，这并不认为是操作魔方，由裁判决定。

clauses.en: During the solve, the competitor may hold the puzzle against the surface to help operate the puzzle (see [Regulation 7f1d](regulations:regulation:7f1d)).
clauses.zh: 复原过程中，选手可以把魔方放在桌面上以辅助操作魔方（见[规则7f1d](regulations:regulation:7f1d)）。

clauses.en: During the solve, once a competitor operates the puzzle with one hand, they must not operate the puzzle with the other hand. Penalty: disqualification of the attempt (DNF).
clauses.zh: 在还原时，一旦选手的某只手操作了魔方，他不能使用另一只手操作魔方。惩罚：取消此次还原资格（DNF）。

clauses.en: Procedure for 3x3x3 Fewest Moves:
clauses.zh: 三阶最少步过程：

clauses.en: The judge distributes a scramble sequence and paper to all competitors. The judge then starts the stopwatch and calls "GO".
clauses.zh: 裁判将打乱公式以及纸张发给所有参赛选手。然后裁判启动秒表并说“开始”。

clauses.en: Before the attempt has begun, the competitor must not write on any paper intended for the attempt. Exception: the competitor may write information to identify the attempt (see [Regulation E2c1](regulations:regulation:E2c1)). If they write this information on the paper that contains the scramble sequence, they must write only on the side without the scramble sequence before the attempt. Penalty for writing anything other than information to identify the attempt: disqualification of the attempt (DNF). Exception: if the competitor does not gain any advantage by writing additional information, the result may stand, at the discretion of the WCA Delegate.
clauses.zh: 尝试开始前，选手不能在尝试相关的任何纸张上书写。例外：选手可以写下识别这次尝试的信息（见[规则E2c1](regulations:regulation:E2c1)）。如果他在包含打乱的纸上写这个，他在尝试前只能写在不包含打乱的那一面。对书写任何非识别这次尝试信息的惩罚：取消此次还原资格（DNF）。例外：如果选手没有因为写下其它信息而获得优势，成绩可以保留，由WCA代表决定。

clauses.en: [RECOMMENDATION] If a judge finds a submitted solution that does not appear to have information to identify the attempt, they should check both sides of the paper.
clauses.zh: [建议] 如果裁判发现一个提交的解法似乎不包括标明尝试的信息，他应该检查一下这张纸的正反两面。

clauses.en: Before the attempt has begun, the competitor must not reveal the scramble sequence. Penalty: disqualification of the attempt (DNF).
clauses.zh: 尝试开始前，选手禁止获知或展现打乱序列。惩罚：取消此次还原成绩（DNF）。

clauses.en: All competitors have a total time limit of 60 minutes to find and write a solution.
clauses.zh: 选手有最多60分钟找到并写出一个解法。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] A competitor may choose to stop an attempt early by handing in a solution before the time limit.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 选手可以选择在时限到达前提交他的解法并结束还原。

clauses.en: The judge should call "5 MINUTES REMAINING" at 55 minutes, and must call "STOP" at 60 minutes.
clauses.zh: 裁判应该在时间过去55分钟时说“还剩5分钟”，并必须在60分钟时说“停”。

clauses.en: If a competitor joins an attempt that is already in progress (see [Regulation E6](regulations:regulation:E6)), their time limit is the time remaining (i.e. they must finish when other competitors reach their 60 minute time limit).
clauses.zh: 如果有选手在一次尝试已经在进行的时候才开始（见[规则E6](regulations:regulation:E6)），则他们的时限是当前其他选手的剩余时间（也就是说他们必须在其他选手达到60分钟时限的时候完成）。

clauses.en: At 60 minutes, each competitor must submit to the judge a single piece of paper with a written solution and information to identify the attempt. The competitor's solution is considered correct if starting with a solved puzzle and applying the scramble sequence followed by the solution results in a solved puzzle. Penalty for an incorrect solution: disqualification of the attempt (DNF).
clauses.zh: 在60分钟时，每个选手必须向裁判提交一张包含解法和识别尝试的信息的纸张。选手的解法在以下情况时被认为是正确的：从一个已复原的魔方开始，操作一遍打乱步骤，然后操作一遍选手的解法，最后魔方状态是还原态。对不正确的解法的惩罚：取消此次还原成绩（DNF）。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] Although the judge may provide a standard sheet for competitors to submit solutions, a competitor may submit a solution on a different piece of paper. (Note that the piece of paper must come from the judge, according to [Regulation E3a](regulations:regulation:E3a).)
clauses.zh: [澄清] 虽然裁判可以给选手提供一张标准答案纸用于提交解法，选手仍然可以在另一张纸上提交解法。（注意根据[规则E3a](regulations:regulation:E3a)，这张纸也必须由裁判提供。）

clauses.en: Information to identify the attempt is: the competitor's name, WCA ID, or competition registrant ID (at least one, optionally multiple), and optionally the competition name, round, or attempt number. Penalty for a submitted solution without information to identify the attempt: disqualification of the attempt (DNF). Information to identify the attempt may be added by the competitor after the attempt has been submitted but before the end of the competition, at the discretion of the WCA Delegate and under the direct supervision of a judge. The competitor must not write anything after the time limit without the judge's supervision and must not make any changes to the solution. Penalty: disqualification of the attempt (DNF).
clauses.zh: 识别尝试的信息包括：选手姓名、WCA ID或者比赛报名ID（至少包括一项，可以写多项）；以及可选的：比赛的名称、轮次、尝试序号。对没有写明识别尝试的信息的惩罚：取消此次还原成绩（DNF）。选手可以在提交解法后但在比赛尚未结束之时，在裁判的直接监督下补充用于识别该尝试的信息，由WCA代表决定。选手在时间限制结束后不得在没有裁判监督的情况下书写任何内容，也不得对解法进行任何更改。处罚：取消此次还原资格（DNF）。

clauses.en: [EXPLANATION] The competitor is not required to write the competition name, round, and/or attempt number on their submitted paper, but may wish to do so in order to help the organization team keep track of submitted solutions.
clauses.zh: [解释] 选手不需要在提交的纸上写明比赛名称、轮次或者尝试序号，但可以这么做以帮助主办团队辨认提交的解法。

clauses.en: The solution must be an unambiguous sequence of moves with each move written out in sequential order. Penalty for an ambiguous solution: disqualification of the attempt (DNF).
clauses.zh: 解法必须是清晰无歧义的，每一步按照顺序写出的。对有歧义解法的惩罚：取消此次还原成绩（DNF）。

clauses.en: [EXAMPLE] Examples that are not considered a single unambiguous move sequence: multiple solution sequences without exactly one clearly indicated solution, a solution with ambiguous symbols (e.g. a letter that looks similar to "B" and "R" but is not clearly one or the other), a solution with stars or arrows indicating moves to be performed out of written order (e.g. "insertions" that are not written in-line with the rest of the move sequence, "pre-moves" that are not incorporated into the move sequence using valid notation), a move sequence that is not written out roughly as a series of lines in reading order, any arrangement of symbols that cannot be interpreted as an unambiguous move sequence. Exceptions to the examples above: small typographic corrections (e.g. blacking out moves and writing moves above that are clearly meant to replace them, moves written in subscript or superscript to fit between other moves).
clauses.zh: [举例] 不被认为是唯一无歧义的解法的例子：没有一个清晰标明是指定解法的多个解法；里面有不清晰的符号（例如一个看起来又像B又像R的字母，但不是清晰的其中任何一个）的解法；一个有星号或者箭头的指明需要不按照书写顺序执行的步骤（例如，没有写在其他步骤里的“插入”，没有用合法写法加入到解法中的“预打乱”）的解法；一个不能按阅读顺序书写的一系列的行，导致符号的排列不能被无歧义地解释的解法。以上例子的例外：小的书写错误的修正（例如划掉一些步骤然后在其上写其他步骤，清晰的标明是要替换它们，以上标或下标形式书写以能在其他步骤之间写下的步骤）。

clauses.en: [REMINDER] In the past, bracket notations (e.g. [r] or [u2]) were permitted for Fewest Moves. Only rotations based on x, y, or z are permitted now (see [Regulation 12a4a](regulations:regulation:12a4a)).
clauses.zh: [提醒] 在过去，带方括号的表述方法（例如[r]或[u2]）曾经被允许在最少步中使用。现在只有使用x、y、z的转体表述被允许（见[规则12a4a](regulations:regulation:12a4a)）。

clauses.en: The competitor should make it clear which moves are intended to be part of their solution, by clearly blacking out/scribbling out any moves to exclude, or by drawing a single outline around their solution.
clauses.zh: 选手应明确标示出哪些步骤是其解法的一部分，可以通过清晰地将不包括的步骤涂黑/划掉，或通过在解法步骤周围画一个单一的轮廓线来表示。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] If a move is not clearly blacked out/scribbled out and it is not clear whether the move is part of the solution, the judge should consider it an ambiguous move sequence (see [Regulation E2c2](regulations:regulation:E2c2) and [Regulation E2c2+](regulations:regulation:E2c2+)).
clauses.zh: [澄清] 如果一个步骤没有被清晰的涂掉而这个步骤是否是这个解法的一部分并不清晰，裁判应该认为这是一份有歧义的解法（见[规则E2c2](regulations:regulation:E2c2)及[规则E2c2+](regulations:regulation:E2c2+)）。

clauses.en: Only numbers, letters, and apostrophes are considered as part of a competitor's solution. Other symbols are disregarded. The remaining solution must only use moves that are exactly defined as notation for the 3x3x3 Cube in [Regulation 12a](regulations:regulation:12a). Penalty: disqualification of the attempt (DNF).
clauses.zh: 只有数字、字母和撇号（'）被视为选手解法的一部分。其他符号将被忽略。余下的解法步骤必须仅使用[规则12a](regulations:regulation:12a)中明确定义的三阶魔方的转动符号。惩罚：取消此次还原成绩（DNF）。

clauses.en: [EXAMPLE] Examples of interpreting symbols or combinations of symbols that are not defined in [Regulation 12a](regulations:regulation:12a): [x] should be interpreted as x. (R * U', * = F2) should be interpreted as R U' F2. (R U)' should be interpreted as R U'. R++ should be interpreted as R. R3' is not permitted.
clauses.zh: [举例] 在[规则12a](regulations:regulation:12a)中没有定义的符号或符号组合的解释示例：[x]应解释为x；(R * U', * = F2)应解释为R U' F2；(R U)'应解释为R U'；R++应解释为R；R3'不被允许。

clauses.en: [ADDITION] Moves with both an apostrophe and a 2 should be interpreted as if there were no apostrophe (e.g. R2' should be interpreted as R2).
clauses.zh: [附加] 同时带有撇号和2的步骤应解释为没有撇号的步骤（例如，R2'应解释为R2）。

clauses.en: If a competitor used incorrect capitalization for a move defined in [Regulation 12a](regulations:regulation:12a), it should be interpreted as if it has the correct capitalization and accepted as valid notation.
clauses.zh: 如果选手在使用[规则12a](regulations:regulation:12a)中定义的转动符号时，大小写不正确，应将其解释为正确的大小写，并接受为有效的转动符号。

clauses.en: [EXAMPLE] Y should be interpreted as y. UW, uw, and uW should be interpreted as Uw. r should be interpreted as R, not Rw.
clauses.zh: [举例] Y应解释为y；UW、uw和uW应解释为Uw；r应解释为R而不是Rw.

clauses.en: Any writing or other markings on the solution sheet which are clearly not a part of the competitor's intended solution may be disregarded, at the discretion of the judge.
clauses.zh: 裁判可以酌情忽略任何明显不是选手解法一部分的符号或标记。

clauses.en: Competitors must not intentionally make their solution harder to judge by using moves or symbols not defined as notation for the 3x3x3 Cube, incorrect capitalization, or by any other means. Penalty: disqualification of the attempt (DNF) at the discretion of the WCA Delegate.
clauses.zh: 选手不得故意通过使用未定义为三阶魔方转动的步骤或符号、错误的大小写或其他任何方式使其解法变得更难以辨识。惩罚：取消此次还原成绩（DNF），由WCA代表决定。

clauses.en: The competitor's result is the number of moves in their solution, calculated using Outer Block Turn Metric (see [Regulation 12a5](regulations:regulation:12a5)).
clauses.zh: 选手的成绩是按照Outer Block Turn Metric（见[规则12a5](regulations:regulation:12a5)）计算得到的步数。

clauses.en: The competitor's solution must not exceed 80 moves (including rotations) when calculated using Execution Turn Metric (see [Regulation 12a6](regulations:regulation:12a6)). Penalty: disqualification of the attempt (DNF).
clauses.zh: 选手只能提交按照Execution Turn Metric（见[规则 12a6](regulations:regulation:12a6)）计算长度不超过80步（包括整体转动）的解法。惩罚：取消此次成绩（DNF）。

clauses.en: The competitor's solution must not be directly derived from any part of the scramble sequence. Penalty: disqualification of the attempt (DNF), at the discretion of the WCA Delegate.
clauses.zh: 选手的解法禁止与打乱公式有任何关联。惩罚：取消此次还原资格（DNF），由WCA代表决定。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] Competitors must not derive solutions from any part of the scramble sequence, and solutions should not share significant parts with the inverse scramble sequence.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 选手不能根据打乱公式的任何一部分推导解法，且解法与逆序打乱公式不能有明显重合的部分。

clauses.en: [EXAMPLE] Example of solutions that should result in a disqualification of the attempt (DNF): solutions beginning with the same 4 or more moves as the inverse scramble sequence.
clauses.zh: [举例] 以下情况将会被取消还原资格（DNF）：解法的前4步以上与逆序打乱公式完全一致。

clauses.en: The WCA Delegate may ask the competitor to explain the purpose of each move in their solution, irrespective of the scramble sequence. If the competitor cannot give a valid explanation, the attempt is disqualified (DNF).
clauses.zh: WCA代表可以要求选手解释他解法中每一步转动的目的，须与打乱公式无关。如果选手无法给出合理的解释，取消此次还原资格（DNF）。

clauses.en: The competitor may use the following objects during the attempt. Penalty for using unauthorized objects: disqualification of the attempt (DNF). Exception: if the competitor does not gain any advantage by using unauthorized objects, the result may stand, at the discretion of the WCA Delegate.
clauses.zh: 在还原时，选手可以使用以下物品。使用其他未授权物品的惩罚：取消此次还原资格（DNF）。例外：如果选手没有因为使用未授权物品而获得优势，成绩可以保留，由WCA代表决定。

clauses.en: Paper (supplied by the judge), the solution sheet (supplied by the judge), a picture of the scramble for that attempt (which may be included on the paper or solution sheet), and pens/pencils or similar (supplied by the judge, or optionally self-supplied).
clauses.zh: 白纸（由裁判提供）、答题纸（由裁判提供）、本次打乱状态的图片（可能在由裁判提供的白纸或答题纸上）以及笔/铅笔或者类似物品（由裁判提供，选手也可以自备）。

clauses.en: 3x3x3 Cubes (at most 3, self-supplied), which must be as described in [Article 3](regulations:article:3) before starting the attempt.
clauses.zh: 魔方（至多3个，自备），必须在开始尝试前满足[第三章](regulations:article:3)所述要求。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] Puzzles do not need to be solved at the start of the attempt.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 在开始的时候魔方可以不必处于还原状态。

clauses.en: Stickers (self-supplied).
clauses.zh: 贴纸（自备）。

clauses.en: Stopwatch or watch (self-supplied) for keeping track of the elapsed time, if it is approved by the WCA Delegate.
clauses.zh: 用于确认比赛剩余时间的秒表或手表（自备），需要由WCA代表认可。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] Any stopwatch or watch used by a competitor must not have any functions that would help the competitor find a solution.
clauses.zh: [澄清] 任何秒表或时钟不能带有任何对寻找解法有帮助的功能。

clauses.en: [CLARIFICATION] Competitors should not consider a personal stopwatch or watch as the official time, and must submit their solution when the judge calls "STOP".
clauses.zh: [澄清] 选手不应把个人秒表或手表上的时间作为正确时间，且必须在裁判说“停止”时马上提交他们的解法。

clauses.en: Other objects that do not give an unfair advantage, at the discretion of the WCA Delegate (see [Regulation 2i](regulations:regulation:2i)).
clauses.zh: 其他不会使其不当获利的物品，由WCA代表决定(见 [规则2i](regulations:regulation:2i)).

clauses.en: Tools to remove markings (self-supplied), such as correction fluid, correction tape, or erasers.
clauses.zh: 去除笔迹的工具（自备），例如修正液、修正带或者橡皮。

clauses.en: The WCA Delegate may choose to publish the solutions (e.g. photo of the score sheets or transcriptions of solutions).
clauses.zh: WCA代表可以选择公开解法（例如答题纸的照片或抄录的解法）。

clauses.en: The competitor must not communicate with anyone other than the WCA Delegate or the judge. This communication should be about the WCA Regulations and the competitor must not receive assistance deriving their solution. Penalty: disqualification of the attempt (DNF). Exception: if the competitor does not gain an advantage by communicating with anyone other than the WCA Delegate or the judge, the result may stand, at the discretion of the WCA Delegate.
clauses.zh: 选手不得和除WCA代表或裁判以外的任何人交流。交流的内容应该是有关于WCA规则，选手不得获得帮助以得到解法。惩罚：取消此次还原成绩（DNF）。例外：如果选手没有因为和裁判或WCA代表以外的任何人交流而获得优势，成绩可以保留，由WCA代表决定。

clauses.en: A competitor may join a 3x3x3 Fewest Moves attempt that is already in progress, at the discretion of the WCA Delegate. Exception: a competitor must not be permitted to join an ongoing attempt in the following cases:
clauses.zh: 选手可以中途加入已经在进行的三阶最少步比赛尝试，由WCA代表决定。例外：以下情形中，选手不得被允许加入正在进行的比赛：

clauses.en: A competitor has finished their attempt already (see [Regulation E2b+](regulations:regulation:E2b+)).
clauses.zh: 已有选手完成比赛（见[规则E2b+](regulations:regulation:E2b+)）。

clauses.en: The attempt takes place in a competition with multiple physical locations (i.e. "3x3x3 Fewest Moves simultaneous competitions").
clauses.zh: 这次比赛是一场在多个场地进行的比赛（即“三阶最少步同步赛”）。

clauses.en: There is any risk that information about the scramble may have become known to the competitor who wishes to join.
clauses.zh: 存在任何可能导致选手在加入尝试前得知打乱信息的风险。

clauses.en: Standard blindfolded solving procedures are followed, as described in [Article B](regulations:article:B) (Blindfolded Solving). Additional regulations that supersede the corresponding procedures in [Article B](regulations:article:B) are described below.
clauses.zh: 主要遵循盲拧规则，见[规则B](regulations:article:B)（盲拧）。与[规则B](regulations:article:B)中的盲拧规则不同的附加规则见下文。

clauses.en: [ADDITION] If a puzzle with a duplicate scramble is found during an attempt, the puzzle may be re-scrambled using a different scramble sequence, at the discretion of the WCA Delegate.
clauses.zh: [附加] 如果在尝试中发现一个重复打乱的魔方，这个魔方可以被使用另一个打乱重新打乱，由WCA代表决定。

clauses.en: Before an attempt, the competitor must submit to the organization team the number of puzzles (at least 2) they wish to attempt.
clauses.zh: 在开始还原前，选手必须向主办团队提交他希望尝试还原魔方的个数（至少两个）。

clauses.en: A competitor is not permitted to change the number of puzzles after submitting their number to the organization team.
clauses.zh: 在提交以后，选手不允许改变还原个数。

clauses.en: A competitor may request to keep their submission private until all competitors have submitted their numbers. Once all competitors have reported their numbers, the information becomes public (e.g. a competitor may ask for the numbers of any other competitors before starting their attempt).
clauses.zh: 选手可以要求将提交的还原个数保密，直到所有选手都提交了还原个数。一旦所有选手都完成提交，信息将被公开（例如某个选手可以在他开始还原前询问任何其他选手的个数）。

clauses.en: Before the attempt, the scrambled puzzles must be placed on the table in an arbitrary orientation while ensuring they remain completely covered. The puzzles should be arranged in a shape as square as possible and should not be stacked (e.g. 8 puzzles should be arranged in 2 rows with 3 puzzles and 1 row with 2 puzzles and in 1 layer only).
clauses.zh: 开始还原前，打乱好的魔方必须朝向随机地被放在桌上，并保证被遮挡住。魔方应该被摆放成尽量方形并且不应该堆叠起来（例如：8个魔方应该被摆放成2行3个魔方以及一行两个魔方，并被放置成一层）。

clauses.en: If a competitor is attempting fewer than 6 puzzles, they are allotted a time limit of 10 minutes times the number of puzzles in the attempt, else the time limit is 60 minutes. Exception: a competitor who arrives late may compete with a reduced time limit, at the discretion of the WCA Delegate. This competitor's attempt must not be scrambled using the same scramble sequences as competitors who have already completed their attempt (see [Regulation H1f](regulations:regulation:H1f)).
clauses.zh: 如果某个选手尝试还原小于6个魔方，则他的还原时限是10分钟乘以还原个数，否则时限为60分钟。例外：迟到的裁判可以在更短的时限内参与比赛，由WCA代表决定。此选手的尝试禁止使用和已完成尝试的选手相同的打乱（见[规则H1f](regulations:regulation:H1f)）。

clauses.en: The competitor may signal the end of the solve at any time. If and when the time limit is reached, the judge stops the attempt and the attempt is then scored; the time limit for the attempt counts as the original recorded time.
clauses.zh: 选手可以在还原的任何时候示意结束还原。如果达到时限，裁判停止选手的还原并记录成绩，还原时间记为时限。

clauses.en: [REMINDER] The attempt is not disqualified for reaching the time limit, due to exceptions for 3x3x3 Multi-Blind (see [Regulation A1a4](regulations:regulation:A1a4) and [Regulation A1a5](regulations:regulation:A1a5)).
clauses.zh: [提醒] 到达时限后，整个尝试不会被取消成绩（DNF），由三阶多盲规则的例外限定（见[规则A1a4](regulations:regulation:A1a4)和[规则A1a5](regulations:regulation:A1a5)）。

clauses.en: Time penalties for the puzzles of the attempt are cumulative.
clauses.zh: 所有魔方的加罚时间累加。

clauses.en: [EXAMPLE] Example: Suppose a competitor attempts 10 cubes, stops the solve with a time of 59:57, and has two time penalties. The time of the final result is 59:57 + 2*2 = 60:01 (also see [Regulation A1a5](regulations:regulation:A1a5)).
clauses.zh: [举例] 举例：如果选手尝试10个魔方，在59：57秒结束还原，并且有两次加罚时间，那么最终成绩的时间是59：57 + 2*2 = 60:01（或见[规则A1a5](regulations:regulation:A1a5)）

clauses.en: [EXAMPLE] Example: Suppose a competitor attempts 10 cubes, the judge stops the competitor at 60 minutes, and the attempt has two time penalties. The time of the final result is 60:00 + 2*2 = 60:04.
clauses.zh: [举例] 举例：如果选手尝试10个魔方，在60分的时候裁判由于超时结束该选手的还原，并且这些还原中有两次加罚时间，那么最终的时间是60:00 + 2*2 = 60:04。

clauses.en: Any disqualification penalty during an attempt applies to the entire attempt (DNF). Exception: for penalties relating to individual puzzles (e.g. making a move during memorization, using an illegal puzzle), those puzzles may be considered unsolved at the end of the attempt instead of disqualifying the entire attempt, at the discretion of the WCA Delegate.
clauses.zh: 在尝试中任何导致取消成绩的判罚都将导致整个尝试被取消成绩（DNF）。例外：对于仅和单个魔方相关的惩罚（例如在记忆过程转动魔方、使用不合规的魔方等），这些魔方可以在尝试结束时被算作未还原，而不是取消整个尝试的成绩，由WCA代表决定。

clauses.en: If it is planned for competitors to start at significantly different times such that there is a risk that information about the scrambles may have become known to competitors, attempts starting later must use different scramble sequences.
clauses.zh: 如果计划让选手在明显不同的时间开始比赛，且存在选手获知打乱序列的风险，则后开始的尝试必须使用不同的打乱序列。

clauses.en: The competitor may self supply a flat covering (e.g. a mat or a cloth) for the surface, at the discretion of the WCA Delegate. If the competitor wishes to do so, the request must be made at the same time as submitting the number of puzzles (see [Regulation H1a](regulations:regulation:H1a)).
clauses.zh: 选手可以选择自备一个平整的遮盖物（例如一张垫子或者布料）来遮盖魔方，由WCA代表决定。如果选手想这么做，则他必须在提交魔方数量的时候提出（见[规则H1a](regulations:regulation:H1a)）

heading.en: Article I: Head to Head Solving

clauses.en: Qualification and seeding:
clauses.zh: 资格和种子顺位：

clauses.en: The number of available places in a Head to Head round must be one of the following: 4, 8, 12, or 16.
clauses.zh: “一对一”轮次的人数必须是这几个之一：4、8、12或16。

clauses.en: For Head to Head rounds with a prior round, seeding is based on the competitor's rank in the prior round.
clauses.zh: 在有前序轮次的“一对一”轮次中，种子顺位依据选手在前一轮中的排名决定。

clauses.en: For Head to Head round without a prior round, seeding is based on the qualification requirements for the competition.
clauses.zh: 在没有前序轮次的“一对一”轮次中，种子顺位依据比赛的参赛资格要求决定。

clauses.en: If competitors would otherwise have identical seeds, seeding between these competitors is randomized.
clauses.zh: 如果多位选手会获得相同的种子顺位，则这些选手之间的种子顺位以随机排序决定。

clauses.en: Round structure:
clauses.zh: 轮次结构：

clauses.en: A Head to Head round is structured as a single-elimination tournament, comprising a number of stages:
clauses.zh: “一对一”轮次由几个阶段的单败淘汰赛制组成：

clauses.en: For rounds with 4 places: Semifinal Stage and Final Stage.
clauses.zh: 对于有4名选手的情况：半决赛阶段和决赛阶段。

clauses.en: For rounds with 8 places: Quarterfinal Stage, Semifinal Stage, and Final Stage.
clauses.zh: 对于有8名选手的情况：四分之一决赛阶段、半决赛阶段以及决赛阶段。

clauses.en: For rounds with 12 places: Stage of 12, Quarterfinal Stage, Semifinal Stage, and Final Stage.
clauses.zh: 对于有12名选手的情况：前十二阶段、四分之一决赛阶段、半决赛阶段以及决赛阶段。

clauses.en: For rounds with 16 places: Stage of 16, Quarterfinal Stage, Semifinal Stage, and Final Stage.
clauses.zh: 对于有16名选手的情况：前十六阶段、四分之一决赛阶段、半决赛阶段以及决赛阶段。

clauses.en: Each stage comprises a number of matches between 2 competitors:
clauses.zh: 每个阶段由若干在2名选手之间进行的对决构成：

clauses.en: Final Stage: 2 Matches: the Final Match and the Third Place Match.
clauses.zh: 决赛阶段：2场对决：决赛和三四名决赛。

clauses.en: Semifinal Stage: 2 matches.
clauses.zh: 半决赛阶段：2场对决。

clauses.en: Quarterfinal Stage: 4 matches.
clauses.zh: 四分之一决赛阶段：4场对决。

clauses.en: Stage of 12: 4 matches.
clauses.zh: 前十二阶段：4场对决。

clauses.en: Stage of 16: 8 matches.
clauses.zh: 前十六阶段：8场对决。

clauses.en: Matchups in the first stage of a round are based on a competitor's seed. The competitor with the highest seed is matched against the competitor with the lowest seed. The competitor with the second highest seed is matched against the competitor with the second lowest seed. This process is repeated until all competitors have been matched.
clauses.zh: 第一阶段的对阵由选手的种子顺位决定。最高种子对阵最低种子。第二高种子对阵第二低种子。这样一直到所有选手的对阵安排结束。

clauses.en: Exception: for rounds with 12 places the top 4 seeded competitors do not take part in the Stage of 12, but are matched against the winners of the Stage of 12 during the Quarterfinal Stage.
clauses.zh: 例外：对于有12名选手的阶段，前4的种子选手不参与前十二阶段，而是和前十二阶段的胜者在四分之一决赛阶段对阵。

clauses.en: The winner of each match during the Stage of 16, Stage of 12 and Quarterfinal Stage proceeds to the following stage. The loser is eliminated.
clauses.zh: 前十六阶段、前十二阶段、和四分之一决赛阶段的每场对决的胜者晋级到下一阶段。败者出局。

clauses.en: The winner of each match during the Semifinal Stage takes part in the Final Match during the Final Stage. The loser of each match during the Semifinal Stage takes part in the Third Place Match during the Final Stage.
clauses.zh: 半决赛阶段的每场对决的胜者参与决赛阶段的决赛。半决赛阶段的每场对决的败者参与决赛阶段的三四名决赛。

clauses.en: For subsequent stages competitors are matched so that, assuming the higher seed won every previous match, the seeds add up to the number of remaining competitors plus 1.
clauses.zh: 后续阶段的对阵按如下规则确定：假设每场对决都由更高顺位的种子胜出，则由种子顺位之和等于剩余人数加1的两位选手互相对阵。

clauses.en: A [Visual Guide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1dGy7DZZqPNuf8dDHJIJUw5vzwgoRjz1G/view) illustrates the full structure for rounds with 4, 8, 12, and 16 competitors.
clauses.zh: 这里有一个[可视化指南](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1dGy7DZZqPNuf8dDHJIJUw5vzwgoRjz1G/view)展示了包含4、8、12以及16人轮次的完整对阵表。

clauses.en: If a competitor withdraws from a match before it begins, their opponent is treated as winning the match for the purpose of progression (Stage of 16, Stage of 12, Quarterfinal Stage, Semifinal Stage) or overall ranking within the round (Final Stage), but no results are recorded for the match (see [Regulation 9f5b](regulations:regulation:9f5b)).
clauses.zh: 如果一名选手在某场对决开始前退出，则他的对手被认为是获得了这场对决的胜利，并晋级到下一个阶段（对于前十六阶段、前十二阶段、四分之一决赛阶段以及半决赛的情况）或者获得相应的排名（对于决赛阶段的情况），但这场比赛没有成绩记录（见[规则9f5b](regulations:regulation:9f5b)）。

clauses.en: Match structure:
clauses.zh: 对决结构:

clauses.en: Each match comprises a number of sets. The winner of the match is the first competitor to win X sets (where X is 1, 2, or 3).
clauses.zh: 每场对决由若干盘构成。先赢得X盘（X是1、2或3）的选手赢得对决的胜利。

clauses.en: X must be the same for all matches within a stage. Exception: for the Final Match, X may be greater than for the Third Place Match.
clauses.zh: 在同一个阶段，所有的对决必须使用一样的X值。例外：对于决赛，X可以比三四名决赛的值更大。

clauses.en: For subsequent stages, X must be the same or higher than the previous stage.
clauses.zh: 后续阶段的X值必须大于或等于前序阶段。

clauses.en: Each set comprises a number of points. The winner of a set is the first competitor to win 3 points.
clauses.zh: 每一盘由若干分组成。先得到3分的选手赢得该盘。

clauses.en: The winner of a point is the competitor with the better result, where "better" is defined as the shorter time. A DNF or DNS is the worst possible result.
clauses.zh: 每一分成绩更好的选手得到这一分，这里的“好”指的是更短的时间。DNF或DNS是最差的可能成绩。

clauses.en: If neither competitor has a better result, neither wins the point.
clauses.zh: 如果双方都没有获得更好的成绩，双方均不得分。

clauses.en: If neither competitor wins a set after 7 points, the competitor with the most points wins the set. If both competitors have the same number of points, the competitor with the best single result in the set wins the set. If neither competitor has a best single result in the set, the best single results in the match and then single results in the round are considered. If necessary, the competitors' seeds act as a final tiebreaker, with the higher-seeded competitor winning the set.
clauses.zh: 7分之后，如果还没有人赢得这一盘，则当前更高分的选手赢得这盘。如果分数相同，则在这盘中获得最好单次成绩的选手赢得这盘。如果还不能区分，则依序比较在当前对决中的最好单次成绩以及在整轮当中的单次最好成绩。如还有必要，种子顺位将作为最后的区分手段，高种子选手赢得该盘。

clauses.en: Head to Head speed solving procedures:
clauses.zh: “一对一”速拧流程：

clauses.en: Standard speed solving procedures are followed, as described in [Article A](regulations:article:A). Additional regulations that supersede the corresponding procedures in Article A are described below.
clauses.zh: 主要遵循标准速拧流程，如[附则A](regulations:article:A)中所述。覆盖附则A中相应流程的附加规则如下所述。

clauses.en: Scrambling:
clauses.zh: 打乱：

clauses.en: Competitors in a match must use the same scramble sequences as each other for a point. Each point must use different scramble sequences and each match must use different scramble sequences.
clauses.zh: 一场对决中的选手必须在每一分的比赛中都使用相同的打乱序列。不同分必须使用不同的打乱序列，不同对决也必须使用不同的打乱序列。

clauses.en: Inspection:
clauses.zh: 观察：

clauses.en: When both competitors are present at the solving station and when each judge is ready, the announcer asks "READY?".
clauses.zh: 当两名选手均已经到达比赛位并且各裁判已经做好准备，发令员问“准备好了吗？”。

clauses.en: When both competitors have confirmed they are ready, or once at least 15 seconds have passed, the announcer calls "START" and starts timing the inspection, beginning the point.
clauses.zh: 当两名选手均已确认准备好或者至少已经过了15秒，发令员报“开始观察”并开始对观察进行计时，开始这一分的对决。

clauses.en: When 8 seconds of inspection have elapsed, the announcer calls "8 SECONDS".
clauses.zh: 当观察时间达到8秒时，发令员报出“8秒”。

clauses.en: When 11 seconds, 12 seconds, and 13 seconds of inspection have elapsed, the announcer calls "3", "2", and "1" respectively.
clauses.zh: 当观察时间达到11秒、12秒、13秒时，发令员依序报出“3”、“2”、“1”。

clauses.en: When 14 seconds of inspection have elapsed, the announcer calls "GO". The competitor must start the solve (see [Regulation A4d](regulations:regulation:A4d)) at this point. Penalty for intentionally delaying the start of the solve: disqualification of the attempt (DNF) at the discretion of the judge.
clauses.zh: 当观察时间达到14秒时，发令员报出“开始”。选手此时必须开始复原（见[规则A4d](regulations:regulation:A4d)）。对故意延迟开始复原的处罚：取消此次尝试成绩（DNF），由裁判决定。

clauses.en: Due to modified inspection procedures, the usual penalties for not starting within 15 seconds (see [Regulation A4d1](regulations:regulation:A4d1) and [Regulation A4d2](regulations:regulation:A4d2)) do not apply in Head to Head rounds.
clauses.zh: 因为观察流程的修改，通常对于没有在15秒内开始的处罚（见[规则A4d1](regulations:regulation:A4d1)和[规则A4d2](regulations:regulation:A4d2)）在“一对一”轮次中不适用。

clauses.en: The competitor must not start the solve before the announcer calls "GO". Penalty: disqualification of the attempt (DNF) at the discretion of the judge.
clauses.zh: 选手禁止在发令员报出“开始”之前开始复原。惩罚：取消此次尝试成绩（DNF），由裁判决定。

clauses.en: Recording results:
clauses.zh: 记录成绩:

clauses.en: When recording the result, the judge also notes whether a competitor won or lost a point, or there was no winner, on the score sheet.
clauses.zh: 在记录成绩时，裁判同样也在成绩单上备注这名选手在这一分上是获胜还是落败，或者是没有人获胜。

clauses.en: Head to Head blindfolded solving procedures:
clauses.zh: “一对一”盲拧流程：

clauses.en: Standard speed solving procedures (as described in [Article A](regulations:article:A)), blindfolded solving procedures (as described in [Article B](regulations:article:B)) and Head to Head speed solving procedures (as described in [Regulation I4](regulations:regulation:I4)) are followed. Additional regulations that supersede the corresponding procedures are described below.
clauses.zh: 主要遵循标准速拧流程（如[附则A](regulations:article:A)中所述）、标准盲拧流程（如[附则B](regulations:article:B)中所述）以及“一对一”速拧流程（如[规则I4](regulations:regulation:I4)中所述）。覆盖其中相应流程的附加规则如下所述。

clauses.en: Starting the attempt:
clauses.zh: 开始尝试：

clauses.en: When both competitors are present at the solving station and when each judge is ready, the announcer asks "READY?".
clauses.zh: 当两名选手均已经到达比赛位并且各裁判已经做好准备，发令员问“准备好了吗？”。

clauses.en: When both competitors have confirmed they are ready, or once at least 15 seconds have passed, the announcer calls “3, 2, 1, GO". The competitor must start the solve (see [Regulation B2d](regulations:regulation:B2d)) at this point. Penalty for intentionally delaying the start of the solve: disqualification of the attempt (DNF) at the discretion of the judge.
clauses.zh: 当两名选手均已确认准备好或者至少已经过了15秒，发令员报“3、2、1，开始”。选手此时必须开始复原（见[规则B2d](regulations:regulation:B2d)）。对故意延迟开始复原的处罚：取消此次尝试成绩（DNF），由裁判决定。

clauses.en: The competitor must not start the solve before the announcer calls "GO". Penalty: disqualification of the attempt (DNF) at the discretion of the judge.
clauses.zh: 选手禁止在发令员报出“开始”之前开始复原。惩罚：取消此次尝试成绩（DNF），由裁判决定。
